Adaptive Radix Tree in C++, optionally with Optimistic Lock Coupling

51template <typename Key, typename Value>
52class db;

54template <typename Key, typename Value>
55class olc_db;

57} // namespace unodb

59namespace unodb::detail {
60
71template <bool Enabled, class Storage, template <class> class CritSec>
72struct value_bitmask_field {
73 CritSec<Storage> bits{};
74
75 [[nodiscard]] bool test(std::uint8_t i) const noexcept {
76 const auto bval = bits.load();
77 if (UNODB_DETAIL_UNLIKELY(i >= sizeof(Storage) * 8)) return false;
78 return (bval >> i) & 1U;
79 }
80 void set(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
81 bits = static_cast<Storage>(bits.load() | (Storage{1} << i));
82 }
83 void clear(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
84 bits = static_cast<Storage>(bits.load() & ~(Storage{1} << i));
85 }
87 void remove_at(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
88 const Storage bval = bits.load();
89 const auto above =
90 static_cast<Storage>(bval >> static_cast<unsigned>(i + 1));
91 const auto below = static_cast<Storage>(bval & ((Storage{1} << i) - 1));
92 bits = static_cast<Storage>(below | (above << i));
93 }
96 void insert_at(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
97 const Storage bval = bits.load();
98 const auto above = static_cast<Storage>(bval >> i);
99 const auto below = static_cast<Storage>(bval & ((Storage{1} << i) - 1));
100 bits =
101 static_cast<Storage>(below | (above << static_cast<unsigned>(i + 1)));
102 }
103};
104
106template <bool Enabled, class T, std::size_t N, template <class> class CritSec>
107struct value_bitmask_field<Enabled, std::array<T, N>, CritSec> {
108 std::array<CritSec<T>, N> bits{};
109
110 [[nodiscard]] bool test(std::uint8_t i) const noexcept {
111 const T byte_val = bits[static_cast<std::size_t>(i) / 8].load();
112 return (static_cast<unsigned>(byte_val) >>
113 (static_cast<unsigned>(i) % 8U)) &
114 1U;
115 }
116 void set(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
117 const auto idx = static_cast<std::size_t>(i) / 8;
118 bits[idx] = static_cast<T>(bits[idx].load() |
119 (T{1} << (static_cast<unsigned>(i) % 8U)));
120 }
121 void clear(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
122 const auto idx = static_cast<std::size_t>(i) / 8;
123 bits[idx] = static_cast<T>(bits[idx].load() &
124 ~(T{1} << (static_cast<unsigned>(i) % 8U)));
125 }
126};
127
129template <class Storage, template <class> class CritSec>
130struct value_bitmask_field<false, Storage, CritSec> {
131 [[nodiscard]] static constexpr bool test(std::uint8_t) noexcept {
132 return false;
133 }
134 static constexpr void set(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
135 static constexpr void clear(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
136 static constexpr void remove_at(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
137 static constexpr void insert_at(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
138};
139
141template <class T, std::size_t N, template <class> class CritSec>
142struct value_bitmask_field<false, std::array<T, N>, CritSec> {
143 [[nodiscard]] static constexpr bool test(std::uint8_t) noexcept {
144 return false;
145 }
146 static constexpr void set(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
147 static constexpr void clear(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
148 static constexpr void remove_at(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
149 static constexpr void insert_at(std::uint8_t) noexcept {}
150};
151
152#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
153
163[[nodiscard, gnu::const]] inline auto _mm_cmple_epu8(__m128i x,
164 __m128i y) noexcept {
165 return _mm_cmpeq_epi8(_mm_max_epu8(y, x), y);
166}
167
168#elif !defined(__aarch64__)
169
175[[nodiscard, gnu::const]] constexpr std::uint32_t has_zero_byte(
176 std::uint32_t v) noexcept {
177 return ((v - 0x01010101UL) & ~v & 0x80808080UL);
178}
179
183[[nodiscard, gnu::const]] constexpr std::uint32_t contains_byte(
184 std::uint32_t v, std::byte b) noexcept {
185 return has_zero_byte(v ^ (~0U / 255 * static_cast<std::uint8_t>(b)));
186}
187
188#endif // #ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
189
198//
199// TODO(thompsonbry) Partial or no key in leaf. Once we template for the Value
200// type, we can optimize for u64 or smaller values, the leaf should be replaced
201// by the use of a variant {Value,node_ptr} entry in the inode along with a bit
202// mask to indicate for each position whether it is a leaf or a node. This
203// provides a significant optimization for secondary index use cases (tree
204// height is reduced by one, no small allocations for leaves, the key is no
205// longer explicitly stored, the key size is no longer stored, the value size is
206// no longer stored, etc.). However, we would still need to allocate a leaf for
207// the case where Value is a std::span. But this becomes a simple immutable
208// data structure which exists solely to wrap the Value.
209template <class Key, class Header>
210class [[nodiscard]] basic_leaf final : public Header {
211 public:
214 using key_size_type = unodb::key_size_type;
215
218 using value_size_type = unodb::value_size_type;
219
221 static constexpr std::size_t max_key_size =
222 std::numeric_limits<key_size_type>::max();
223
225 static constexpr std::size_t max_value_size =
226 std::numeric_limits<value_size_type>::max();
227
229 using art_key_type = basic_art_key<Key>;
230
231 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26485)
232
233 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26481)
238 constexpr basic_leaf(art_key_type k, value_view v) noexcept
239 : key_size{static_cast<key_size_type>(k.size())},
240 value_size{static_cast<value_size_type>(v.size())} {
241 // Note: Runtime checks are handled upstream of this by
242 // make_db_leaf_ptr().
243 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(k.size() <= max_key_size);
244 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(v.size() <= max_value_size);
245
246 const auto tmp{k.get_key_view()};
247 std::memcpy(data, tmp.data(), key_size); // store encoded key
248 if (!v.empty()) std::memcpy(data + key_size, v.data(), value_size);
249 }
250 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
251
252
255 //
256 // TODO(thompsonbry) : Partial or no key in leaf?
257 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_key() const noexcept {
258 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Key, key_view>) {
259 return art_key_type{get_key_view()};
260 } else {
261 // Use memcpy since alignment is not guaranteed because the
262 // [key] is not an explicit part of the leaf data structure.
263 //
264 // TODO(thompsonbry) memory align leaf::data[0] to 8 bytes?
265 Key u{};
266 std::memcpy(&u, data, sizeof(u));
267 // Note: The encoded key is stored in the leaf. Since the
268 // art_key constructor encodes the key, we need to decode the
269 // key before calling the constructor.
270 return art_key_type{bswap(u)};
271 }
272 }
273
277 //
278 // TODO(thompsonbry) : Partial or no key in leaf?
279 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_key_view() const noexcept {
280 return key_view{data, key_size};
281 }
282
283 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
284
285
288 //
289 // TODO(thompsonbry) : Partial or no key in leaf?
290 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto matches(
291 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
292 art_key_type k) const noexcept {
293 return cmp(k) == 0;
294 }
295
299 //
300 // TODO(thompsonbry) : Partial or no key in leaf?
301 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto cmp(art_key_type k) const noexcept {
302 return k.cmp(get_key_view());
303 }
304
305 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26481)
306 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26485)
307
311 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_value_view() const noexcept {
312 return value_view{data + key_size, value_size};
313 }
314
319 template <typename Value>
320 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_value() const noexcept {
321 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Value, value_view>) {
322 return get_value_view();
323 } else {
324 static_assert(std::is_trivially_copyable_v<Value>);
325 Value v{};
326 // cppcheck-suppress memsetClass
327 std::memcpy(&v, data + key_size, sizeof(v));
328 return v;
329 }
330 }
331
336 template <typename Value>
337 constexpr void set_value(const Value& v) noexcept {
338 static_assert(!std::is_same_v<Value, value_view>,
339 "set_value cannot be used with value_view — leaf size is "
340 "fixed");
341 static_assert(std::is_trivially_copyable_v<Value>);
342 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(sizeof(Value) == value_size);
343 // cppcheck-suppress memsetClass
344 std::memcpy(data + key_size, &v, sizeof(Value));
345 }
346
347 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
348 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
349
353 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_size() const noexcept {
354 return compute_size(key_size, value_size);
355 }
356
360 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os,
361 bool /*recursive*/) const {
362 os << ", ";
363 ::unodb::detail::dump_key(os, get_key_view());
364 os << ", ";
365 ::unodb::detail::dump_val(os, get_value_view());
366 os << '\n';
367 }
368
374 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr auto compute_size(
375 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
376 key_size_type key_size, value_size_type val_size) noexcept {
377 return sizeof(basic_leaf<Key, Header>) + key_size + val_size -
378 1 // because of the [1] byte on the end of the struct.
379 ;
380 }
381
382 private:
384 const key_size_type key_size;
386 const value_size_type value_size;
389 //
390 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(modernize-avoid-c-arrays)
391 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26495)
392 std::byte data[1];
393 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
394}; // class basic_leaf
395
403UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26495)
404template <class Header>
405class [[nodiscard]] basic_leaf<no_key_tag, Header> final : public Header {
406 public:
407 using value_size_type = unodb::value_size_type;
408
409 static constexpr std::size_t max_value_size =
410 std::numeric_limits<value_size_type>::max();
411
412 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26485)
413 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26481)
414
415
416 constexpr explicit basic_leaf(value_view v) noexcept
417 : value_size{static_cast<value_size_type>(v.size())} {
418 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(v.size() <= max_value_size);
419 if (!v.empty()) std::memcpy(data, v.data(), value_size);
420 }
421
422 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
423 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
424
426 template <typename ArtKey>
427 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto matches(ArtKey /*k*/) const noexcept {
428 return true;
429 }
430
431 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26481)
432 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26485)
433
435 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_value_view() const noexcept {
436 return value_view{data, value_size};
437 }
438
440 template <typename Value>
441 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_value() const noexcept {
442 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Value, value_view>) {
443 return get_value_view();
444 } else {
445 // LCOV_EXCL_START — keyless leaf only instantiated with value_view
446 static_assert(std::is_trivially_copyable_v<Value>);
447 Value v{};
448 std::memcpy(&v, data, sizeof(v));
449 return v;
450 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
451 }
452 }
453
455 template <typename Value>
456 constexpr void set_value(const Value& v) noexcept {
457 static_assert(!std::is_same_v<Value, value_view>,
458 "set_value cannot be used with value_view — leaf size is "
459 "fixed");
460 static_assert(std::is_trivially_copyable_v<Value>);
461 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(sizeof(Value) == value_size);
462 std::memcpy(data, &v, sizeof(v));
463 }
464
465 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
466 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
467
469 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_size() const noexcept {
470 return compute_size(value_size);
471 }
472
474 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os,
475 bool /*recursive*/) const {
476 os << ", (keyless), ";
477 ::unodb::detail::dump_val(os, get_value_view());
478 os << '\n';
479 }
480
482 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr auto compute_size(
483 value_size_type val_size) noexcept {
484 return sizeof(basic_leaf<no_key_tag, Header>) + val_size - 1;
485 }
486
488 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr auto compute_size(
489 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
490 key_size_type /*key_size*/, value_size_type val_size) noexcept {
491 return compute_size(val_size);
492 }
493
494 private:
495 const value_size_type value_size;
496 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(modernize-avoid-c-arrays)
497 std::byte data[1];
498}; // class basic_leaf<no_key_tag, Header>
499UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
500
501
516template <typename Key, typename Value, template <typename, typename> class Db>
517[[nodiscard]] auto make_db_leaf_ptr(basic_art_key<Key> k, Value v,
518 Db<Key, Value>& db
519 UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) {
520 using db_type = Db<Key, Value>;
521 using header_type = typename db_type::header_type;
522 using leaf_type = basic_leaf<leaf_key_type<Key, Value>, header_type>;
523
524 if constexpr (!can_eliminate_key_in_leaf_v<Key, Value> &&
525 std::is_same_v<Key, key_view>) {
526 if (UNODB_DETAIL_UNLIKELY(k.size() > leaf_type::max_key_size)) {
527 throw std::length_error("Key length must fit in std::uint32_t");
528 }
529 }
530
531 // Serialize value to bytes for leaf storage.
532 value_view leaf_val_bytes;
533 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26496)
534 [[maybe_unused]] std::byte val_buf[sizeof(Value)]{};
535 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
536 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Value, value_view>) {
537 leaf_val_bytes = v;
538 } else {
539 static_assert(std::is_trivially_copyable_v<Value>);
540 std::memcpy(val_buf, &v, sizeof(v));
541 leaf_val_bytes = value_view{val_buf, sizeof(v)};
542 }
543
544 if (UNODB_DETAIL_UNLIKELY(leaf_val_bytes.size_bytes() >
545 leaf_type::max_value_size)) {
546 throw std::length_error("Value length must fit in std::uint32_t");
547 }
548
549 std::size_t size;
550 if constexpr (can_eliminate_key_in_leaf_v<Key, Value>) {
551 size = leaf_type::compute_size(
552 static_cast<typename leaf_type::value_size_type>(
553 leaf_val_bytes.size_bytes()));
554 } else {
555 size = leaf_type::compute_size(
556 static_cast<typename leaf_type::key_size_type>(k.size()),
557 static_cast<typename leaf_type::value_size_type>(
558 leaf_val_bytes.size_bytes()));
559 }
560
561 auto* const leaf_mem = static_cast<std::byte*>(db.get_allocator().alloc(
562 size, alignment_for_new<leaf_type>(), db.get_allocator().ctx));
563
564#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
565 db.increment_leaf_count(size);
566#endif // UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
567
568 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26402)
569 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26400)
570 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26496)
571 auto* const leaf = [&]() noexcept {
572 if constexpr (can_eliminate_key_in_leaf_v<Key, Value>) {
573 return new (leaf_mem) leaf_type{leaf_val_bytes};
574 } else {
575 return new (leaf_mem) leaf_type{k, leaf_val_bytes};
576 }
577 }();
578 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
579 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
580 return basic_db_leaf_unique_ptr<Key, Value, header_type, Db>{
581 leaf, basic_db_leaf_deleter<db_type>{db}};
582 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
583}
584
592template <class INode, class Node4, class Node16, class Node48, class Node256>
593struct basic_inode_def final {
595 using inode = INode;
597 using n4 = Node4;
599 using n16 = Node16;
601 using n48 = Node48;
603 using n256 = Node256;
604
609 template <class Node>
610 [[nodiscard]] static constexpr bool is_inode() noexcept {
611 return std::is_same_v<Node, n4> || std::is_same_v<Node, n16> ||
612 std::is_same_v<Node, n48> || std::is_same_v<Node, n256>;
613 }
614
616 basic_inode_def() = delete;
617};
618
619// Implementation of deleters declared in art_internal.hpp
620
621template <class Db>
622inline void basic_db_leaf_deleter<Db>::operator()(
623 leaf_type* to_delete) const noexcept {
624 const auto leaf_size = to_delete->get_size();
625 const auto& alloc = db.get_allocator();
626 alloc.dealloc(to_delete, leaf_size, alloc.ctx);
627
628#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
629 db.decrement_leaf_count(leaf_size);
630#endif // UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
631}
632
633template <class INode, class Db>
634inline void basic_db_inode_deleter<INode, Db>::operator()(
635 INode* inode_ptr) noexcept {
636 static_assert(std::is_trivially_destructible_v<INode>);
637
638 const auto& alloc = db.get_allocator();
639 alloc.dealloc(inode_ptr, sizeof(INode), alloc.ctx);
640
641#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
642 db.template decrement_inode_count<INode>();
643#endif // UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
644}
645
661template <typename Key, typename Value, template <typename, typename> class Db,
662 template <class> class CriticalSectionPolicy, class LockPolicy,
663 class ReadCriticalSection, class NodePtr,
664 template <typename, typename> class INodeDefs,
665 template <typename, typename, class> class INodeReclamator,
666 template <class> class LeafReclamator>
667struct basic_art_policy final {
670
672 using key_type = Key;
673
675 using value_type = Value;
676
678 using art_key_type = basic_art_key<Key>;
679
681 using node_ptr = NodePtr;
682
684 using header_type = typename NodePtr::header_type;
685
687 using lock_policy = LockPolicy;
688
690 using read_critical_section = ReadCriticalSection;
691
693 using inode_defs = INodeDefs<Key, Value>;
694
696 using inode = typename inode_defs::inode;
697
699 using inode4_type = typename inode_defs::n4;
700
702 using inode16_type = typename inode_defs::n16;
703
705 using inode48_type = typename inode_defs::n48;
706
708 using inode256_type = typename inode_defs::n256;
709
711 using tree_depth_type = tree_depth<art_key_type>;
712
715 static constexpr bool value_in_slot =
716 std::is_trivially_copyable_v<Value> &&
717 (sizeof(Value) <= sizeof(std::uint64_t));
718 static_assert(sizeof(std::uintptr_t) <= sizeof(std::uint64_t),
719 "node_ptr must fit in a uint64_t slot");
720
723 static constexpr bool full_key_in_inode_path = std::is_same_v<Key, key_view>;
724
726 static constexpr bool can_eliminate_key_in_leaf =
727 can_eliminate_key_in_leaf_v<Key, Value>;
728
731 static constexpr bool can_eliminate_leaf =
732 full_key_in_inode_path && value_in_slot;
733
736 [[nodiscard]] static node_ptr pack_value(Value v) noexcept {
737 static_assert(can_eliminate_leaf);
738 std::uint64_t raw{};
739 static_assert(sizeof(v) <= sizeof(raw));
740 // cppcheck-suppress bufferAccessOutOfBounds
741 std::memcpy(&raw, &v, sizeof(v));
742 node_ptr result{nullptr};
743 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26474)
744 // cppcheck-suppress memsetClass
745 std::memcpy(static_cast<void*>(&result), &raw, sizeof(raw));
746 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
747 return result;
748 }
749
751 [[nodiscard]] static Value unpack_value(node_ptr n) noexcept {
752 static_assert(can_eliminate_leaf);
753 const auto raw = n.raw_val();
754 Value v{};
755 // cppcheck-suppress memsetClass
756 std::memcpy(&v, &raw, sizeof(v));
757 return v;
758 }
759
761 using leaf_type =
762 std::conditional_t<can_eliminate_leaf, no_leaf_tag,
763 basic_leaf<leaf_key_type<Key, Value>, header_type>>;
764
766 using db_type = Db<Key, Value>;
767
768 private:
770 template <class INode>
771 using db_inode_deleter = basic_db_inode_deleter<INode, db_type>;
772
774 using leaf_reclaimable_ptr =
775 std::unique_ptr<leaf_type, LeafReclamator<db_type>>;
776
777 public:
779 template <typename T>
780 using critical_section_policy = CriticalSectionPolicy<T>;
781
783
786
788 template <class INode>
789 using db_inode_unique_ptr = std::unique_ptr<INode, db_inode_deleter<INode>>;
790
792 using db_inode4_unique_ptr = db_inode_unique_ptr<inode4_type>;
793
795 using db_inode16_unique_ptr = db_inode_unique_ptr<inode16_type>;
796
798 using db_inode48_unique_ptr = db_inode_unique_ptr<inode48_type>;
799
801 using db_inode256_unique_ptr = db_inode_unique_ptr<inode256_type>;
802
804 template <class INode>
805 using db_inode_reclaimable_ptr =
806 std::unique_ptr<INode, INodeReclamator<Key, Value, INode>>;
807
809 using db_leaf_unique_ptr =
810 basic_db_leaf_unique_ptr<key_type, value_type, header_type, Db>;
811
813
816
824 [[nodiscard]] static auto make_db_leaf_ptr(art_key_type k, value_type v,
825 db_type& db_instance
826 UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) {
827 static_assert(
828 !can_eliminate_leaf,
829 "make_db_leaf_ptr must not be called when leaf is eliminated");
830 return ::unodb::detail::make_db_leaf_ptr<Key, Value, Db>(k, v, db_instance);
831 }
832
839 [[nodiscard]] static auto reclaim_leaf_on_scope_exit(
840 leaf_type* leaf UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND,
841 db_type& db_instance UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept {
842 static_assert(!can_eliminate_leaf,
843 "reclaim_leaf_on_scope_exit must not be called when leaf is "
844 "eliminated");
845 return leaf_reclaimable_ptr{leaf, LeafReclamator<db_type>{db_instance}};
846 }
847
858 [[nodiscard]] static auto reclaim_if_leaf(
859 node_ptr child,
860 db_type& db_instance UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept {
861 if constexpr (can_eliminate_leaf) {
862 struct noop_guard {};
863 return noop_guard{};
864 } else {
865 if (child.type() == node_type::LEAF) {
866 return leaf_reclaimable_ptr{child.template ptr<leaf_type*>(),
867 LeafReclamator<db_type>{db_instance}};
868 }
869 return leaf_reclaimable_ptr{nullptr,
870 LeafReclamator<db_type>{db_instance}};
871 }
872 }
873
883 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_GCC_11_WARNING("-Wmismatched-new-delete")
884 template <class INode, class... Args>
885 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26440)
886 [[nodiscard]] static auto make_db_inode_unique_ptr(db_type& db_instance
887 UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND,
888 Args&&... args) {
889 auto* const inode_mem =
890 static_cast<std::byte*>(db_instance.get_allocator().alloc(
891 sizeof(INode), alignment_for_new<INode>(),
892 db_instance.get_allocator().ctx));
893
894#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
895 db_instance.template increment_inode_count<INode>();
896#endif // UNODB_DETAIL_WITH_STATS
897
898 return db_inode_unique_ptr<INode>{
899 new (inode_mem) INode{db_instance, std::forward<Args>(args)...},
900 db_inode_deleter<INode>{db_instance}};
901 }
902 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
903 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_GCC_11_WARNINGS()
904
913 template <class INode>
914 [[nodiscard]] static auto make_db_inode_unique_ptr(
915 INode* inode_ptr UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND,
916 db_type& db_instance UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept {
917 return db_inode_unique_ptr<INode>{inode_ptr,
918 db_inode_deleter<INode>{db_instance}};
919 }
920
929 template <class INode>
930 [[nodiscard]] static auto make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr(
931 INode* inode_ptr UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND,
932 db_type& db_instance UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept {
933 return db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<INode>{
934 inode_ptr, INodeReclamator<Key, Value, INode>{db_instance}};
935 }
936
937 private:
944 [[nodiscard]] static auto make_db_leaf_ptr(
945 leaf_type* leaf UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND,
946 db_type& db_instance UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept
947 requires(!can_eliminate_leaf)
948 {
949 return basic_db_leaf_unique_ptr<key_type, value_type, header_type, Db>{
950 leaf, basic_db_leaf_deleter<db_type>{db_instance}};
951 }
952
954
956 struct delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit final {
958 constexpr explicit delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit(
959 NodePtr node_ptr_ UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND,
960 db_type& db_ UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept
961 : node_ptr{node_ptr_}, db{db_} {}
962
964 // MSVC C26815 false positive: the destructor creates unique_ptrs whose
965 // deleters hold references to db. These are immediately destroyed while db
966 // (a member reference) is still valid - the constructor's LIFETIMEBOUND
967 // guarantees the referent outlives this object.
968 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
969 ~delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit() noexcept {
970 switch (node_ptr.type()) {
971 case node_type::LEAF: {
972 if constexpr (!can_eliminate_leaf) {
973 const auto r{
974 make_db_leaf_ptr(node_ptr.template ptr<leaf_type*>(), db)};
975 }
976 return;
977 }
978 case node_type::I4: {
979 // cppcheck-suppress throwInNoexceptFunction
980 const auto r{make_db_inode_unique_ptr(
981 node_ptr.template ptr<inode4_type*>(), db)};
982 return;
983 }
984 case node_type::I16: {
985 const auto r{make_db_inode_unique_ptr(
986 node_ptr.template ptr<inode16_type*>(), db)};
987 return;
988 }
989 case node_type::I48: {
990 const auto r{make_db_inode_unique_ptr(
991 node_ptr.template ptr<inode48_type*>(), db)};
992 return;
993 }
994 case node_type::I256: {
995 const auto r{make_db_inode_unique_ptr(
996 node_ptr.template ptr<inode256_type*>(), db)};
997 return;
998 }
999 }
1000 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN(); // LCOV_EXCL_LINE
1001 }
1002 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
1003
1004
1005 delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit(const delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit&) =
1006 delete;
1007
1009 delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit(delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit&&) =
1010 delete;
1011
1013 auto& operator=(const delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit&) = delete;
1014
1016 auto& operator=(delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit&&) = delete;
1017
1018 private:
1020 const NodePtr node_ptr;
1021
1023 db_type& db;
1024 };
1025
1026 public:
1032 struct subtree_guard final {
1033 constexpr subtree_guard(NodePtr node,
1034 db_type& db UNODB_DETAIL_LIFETIMEBOUND) noexcept
1035 : node_{node}, db_{db} {}
1036
1037 ~subtree_guard() noexcept {
1038 if (node_ != nullptr) delete_subtree(node_, db_);
1039 }
1040
1041 void release() noexcept { node_ = nullptr; }
1042
1043 subtree_guard(const subtree_guard&) = delete;
1044 subtree_guard(subtree_guard&&) = delete;
1045 auto& operator=(const subtree_guard&) = delete;
1046 auto& operator=(subtree_guard&&) = delete;
1047
1048 private:
1049 NodePtr node_;
1050 db_type& db_;
1051 };
1052
1055
1060 static void delete_subtree(NodePtr node, db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
1061 delete_db_node_ptr_at_scope_exit delete_on_scope_exit{node, db_instance};
1062
1063 switch (node.type()) {
1064 case node_type::LEAF:
1065 return;
1066 case node_type::I4: {
1067 auto* const subtree_ptr{node.template ptr<inode4_type*>()};
1068 subtree_ptr->delete_subtree(db_instance);
1069 return;
1070 }
1071 case node_type::I16: {
1072 auto* const subtree_ptr{node.template ptr<inode16_type*>()};
1073 subtree_ptr->delete_subtree(db_instance);
1074 return;
1075 }
1076 case node_type::I48: {
1077 auto* const subtree_ptr{node.template ptr<inode48_type*>()};
1078 subtree_ptr->delete_subtree(db_instance);
1079 return;
1080 }
1081 case node_type::I256: {
1082 auto* const subtree_ptr{node.template ptr<inode256_type*>()};
1083 subtree_ptr->delete_subtree(db_instance);
1084 return;
1085 }
1086 }
1087 }
1088
1094 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE static void dump_node(
1095 std::ostream& os, const NodePtr& node, bool recursive = true) {
1096 os << "node at: " << node.template ptr<void*>() << ", tagged ptr = 0x"
1097 << std::hex << node.raw_val() << std::dec;
1098 if (node == nullptr) {
1099 os << '\n';
1100 return;
1101 }
1102 os << ", type = ";
1103 switch (node.type()) {
1104 case node_type::LEAF:
1105 os << "LEAF";
1106 if constexpr (!can_eliminate_leaf) {
1107 node.template ptr<leaf_type*>()->dump(os, recursive);
1108 }
1109 break;
1110 case node_type::I4:
1111 os << "I4";
1112 node.template ptr<inode4_type*>()->dump(os, recursive);
1113 break;
1114 case node_type::I16:
1115 os << "I16";
1116 node.template ptr<inode16_type*>()->dump(os, recursive);
1117 break;
1118 case node_type::I48:
1119 os << "I48";
1120 node.template ptr<inode48_type*>()->dump(os, recursive);
1121 break;
1122 case node_type::I256:
1123 os << "I256";
1124 node.template ptr<inode256_type*>()->dump(os, recursive);
1125 break;
1126 }
1127 }
1128
1130
1132 basic_art_policy() = delete;
1133}; // class basic_art_policy
1134
1136using key_prefix_size = std::uint8_t;
1137
1139static constexpr key_prefix_size key_prefix_capacity = 7;
1140
1146union [[nodiscard]] key_prefix_snapshot {
1147 // TODO(thompsonbry) Can this be replaced by [using
1148 // key_prefix_snapshot = key_prefix<std::uint64_t,
1149 // in_fake_critical_section>]? We need the snapshot to be
1150 // atomic. Does that work with this using decl? [it does not work
1151 // trivially.]
1152 private:
1154 using key_prefix_data = std::array<std::byte, key_prefix_capacity>;
1155
1157 struct [[nodiscard]] inode_fields {
1159 key_prefix_data key_prefix;
1161 key_prefix_size key_prefix_length{};
1162 };
1163
1165 inode_fields f;
1167 std::uint64_t u64;
1168
1169 public:
1173 constexpr explicit key_prefix_snapshot(std::uint64_t v) noexcept : u64(v) {}
1174
1178 [[nodiscard]] constexpr key_view get_key_view() const noexcept {
1179 return key_view(f.key_prefix.data(), f.key_prefix_length);
1180 }
1181
1185 [[nodiscard]] constexpr key_prefix_size length() const noexcept {
1186 return f.key_prefix_length;
1187 }
1188
1196 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto get_shared_length(
1197 std::uint64_t shifted_key_u64) const noexcept {
1198 return shared_len(shifted_key_u64, u64, length());
1199 }
1200
1205 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto operator[](std::size_t i) const noexcept {
1206 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(i < length());
1207 return f.key_prefix[i];
1208 }
1209
1216 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr unsigned shared_len(
1217 std::uint64_t k1, std::uint64_t k2, unsigned clamp_byte_pos) noexcept {
1218 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(clamp_byte_pos < 8);
1219
1220 const auto diff = k1 ^ k2;
1221 const auto clamped = diff | (1ULL << (clamp_byte_pos * 8U));
1222 return static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(clamped) >> 3U);
1223 }
1224}; // class key_prefix_snapshot
1225static_assert(sizeof(key_prefix_snapshot) == sizeof(std::uint64_t));
1226
1234template <typename ArtKey, template <class> class CriticalSectionPolicy>
1235union [[nodiscard]] key_prefix {
1236 private:
1238 template <typename T>
1239 using critical_section_policy = CriticalSectionPolicy<T>;
1240
1242 using key_prefix_data =
1243 std::array<critical_section_policy<std::byte>, key_prefix_capacity>;
1244
1246 struct [[nodiscard]] inode_fields {
1248 key_prefix_data key_prefix;
1250 critical_section_policy<key_prefix_size> key_prefix_length;
1251 };
1252
1254 inode_fields f;
1256 critical_section_policy<std::uint64_t> u64;
1257
1258 public:
1264 key_prefix(key_view k1, ArtKey shifted_k2, tree_depth<ArtKey> depth) noexcept
1265 : u64{make_u64(k1, shifted_k2, depth)} {}
1266
1268 key_prefix(detail::key_prefix_size prefix_len, key_view k1,
1269 tree_depth<ArtKey> depth) noexcept
1270 : u64{make_u64_explicit(prefix_len, k1, depth)} {}
1271
1276 key_prefix(unsigned key_prefix_len,
1277 const key_prefix& source_key_prefix) noexcept
1278 : u64{(source_key_prefix.u64 & key_bytes_mask) |
1279 length_to_word(key_prefix_len)} {
1280 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(key_prefix_len <= key_prefix_capacity);
1281 }
1282
1284 key_prefix(const key_prefix& other) noexcept : u64{other.u64.load()} {}
1285
1287 ~key_prefix() noexcept = default;
1288
1293 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto get_shared_length(
1294 ArtKey shifted_key) const noexcept {
1295 return get_shared_length(shifted_key.get_u64());
1296 }
1297
1302 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto get_shared_length(
1303 std::uint64_t shifted_key_u64) const noexcept {
1304 return shared_len(shifted_key_u64, u64, length());
1305 }
1306
1313 [[nodiscard]] constexpr key_prefix_snapshot get_snapshot() const noexcept {
1314 return key_prefix_snapshot(u64);
1315 }
1316
1320 [[nodiscard]] constexpr key_prefix_size length() const noexcept {
1321 const auto result = f.key_prefix_length.load();
1322 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(result <= key_prefix_capacity);
1323 return result;
1324 }
1325
1329 constexpr void cut(key_prefix_size cut_len) noexcept {
1330 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(cut_len > 0);
1331 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(cut_len <= length());
1332
1333 u64 = ((u64 >> (cut_len * 8)) & key_bytes_mask) |
1334 length_to_word(static_cast<key_prefix_size>(length() - cut_len));
1335
1336 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(f.key_prefix_length.load() <= key_prefix_capacity);
1337 }
1338
1345 constexpr void prepend(const key_prefix& prefix1,
1346 std::byte prefix2) noexcept {
1347 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(length() + prefix1.length() < key_prefix_capacity);
1348
1349 const auto prefix1_bit_length = prefix1.length() * 8U;
1350 const auto prefix1_mask = (1ULL << prefix1_bit_length) - 1;
1351 const auto prefix3_bit_length = length() * 8U;
1352 const auto prefix3_mask = (1ULL << prefix3_bit_length) - 1;
1353 const auto prefix3 = u64 & prefix3_mask;
1354 const auto shifted_prefix3 = prefix3 << (prefix1_bit_length + 8U);
1355 const auto shifted_prefix2 = static_cast<std::uint64_t>(prefix2)
1356 << prefix1_bit_length;
1357 const auto masked_prefix1 = prefix1.u64 & prefix1_mask;
1358
1359 u64 = shifted_prefix3 | shifted_prefix2 | masked_prefix1 |
1360 length_to_word(length() + prefix1.length() + 1U);
1361
1362 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(f.key_prefix_length.load() <= key_prefix_capacity);
1363 }
1364
1369 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto operator[](std::size_t i) const noexcept {
1370 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(i < length());
1371 return f.key_prefix[i].load();
1372 }
1373
1377 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os) const {
1378 const auto len = length();
1379 os << ", prefix(" << len << ")";
1380 if (len > 0) {
1381 os << ": 0x";
1382 for (std::size_t i = 0; i < len; ++i) dump_byte(os, f.key_prefix[i]);
1383 }
1384 }
1385
1387 key_prefix(key_prefix&&) = delete;
1388
1390 key_prefix& operator=(const key_prefix&) = delete;
1391
1393 key_prefix& operator=(key_prefix&&) = delete;
1394
1395 private:
1397 static constexpr auto key_bytes_mask = 0x00FF'FFFF'FFFF'FFFFULL;
1398
1400 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr std::uint64_t length_to_word(
1401 unsigned length) {
1402 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(length <= key_prefix_capacity);
1403 return static_cast<std::uint64_t>(length) << 56U;
1404 }
1405
1407 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr unsigned shared_len(
1408 std::uint64_t k1, std::uint64_t k2, unsigned clamp_byte_pos) noexcept {
1409 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(clamp_byte_pos < 8);
1410
1411 const auto diff = k1 ^ k2;
1412 const auto clamped = diff | (1ULL << (clamp_byte_pos * 8U));
1413 return static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(clamped) >> 3U);
1414 }
1415
1423 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr std::uint64_t make_u64(
1424 key_view k1, ArtKey shifted_k2, tree_depth<ArtKey> depth) noexcept {
1425 k1 = k1.subspan(depth); // shift_right(depth)
1426
1427 const auto k1_u64 = get_u64(k1) & key_bytes_mask;
1428
1429 return k1_u64 | length_to_word(shared_len(k1_u64, shifted_k2.get_u64(),
1430 key_prefix_capacity));
1431 }
1432
1434 [[nodiscard, gnu::const]] static constexpr std::uint64_t make_u64_explicit(
1435 detail::key_prefix_size prefix_len, key_view k1,
1436 tree_depth<ArtKey> depth) noexcept {
1437 k1 = k1.subspan(depth);
1438 const auto k1_u64 = get_u64(k1) & key_bytes_mask;
1439 return k1_u64 | length_to_word(prefix_len);
1440 }
1441}; // class key_prefix
1442
1448template <class NodeHeader>
1449struct iter_result {
1451 using node_ptr = basic_node_ptr<NodeHeader>;
1452
1454 node_ptr node;
1455
1461 std::byte key_byte;
1462
1468 std::uint8_t child_index{};
1469
1471 key_prefix_snapshot prefix;
1472
1477 bool packed_leaf{false};
1478};
1479
1483template <class NodeHeader>
1484using iter_result_opt = std::optional<iter_result<NodeHeader>>;
1485
1490class fake_inode final {
1491 public:
1493 fake_inode() = delete;
1494};
1495
1506template <class ArtPolicy>
1507class basic_inode_impl : public ArtPolicy::header_type {
1508 public:
1511
1513 using key_type = typename ArtPolicy::key_type;
1515 using value_type = typename ArtPolicy::value_type;
1517 using art_key_type = typename ArtPolicy::art_key_type;
1519 using node_ptr = typename ArtPolicy::node_ptr;
1520
1522 template <typename T>
1523 using critical_section_policy =
1524 typename ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy<T>;
1525
1527 using lock_policy = typename ArtPolicy::lock_policy;
1529 using read_critical_section = typename ArtPolicy::read_critical_section;
1530
1532 using db_leaf_unique_ptr = typename ArtPolicy::db_leaf_unique_ptr;
1533
1535 using db_type = typename ArtPolicy::db_type;
1536
1541 using find_result =
1542 std::pair<std::uint8_t, critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>;
1543
1545 using header_type = typename ArtPolicy::header_type;
1547 using iter_result = detail::iter_result<header_type>;
1549 using iter_result_opt = detail::iter_result_opt<header_type>;
1550
1551 protected:
1553 using inode_type = typename ArtPolicy::inode;
1555 using db_inode4_unique_ptr = typename ArtPolicy::db_inode4_unique_ptr;
1557 using db_inode16_unique_ptr = typename ArtPolicy::db_inode16_unique_ptr;
1559 using db_inode48_unique_ptr = typename ArtPolicy::db_inode48_unique_ptr;
1561 using tree_depth_type = typename ArtPolicy::tree_depth_type;
1562
1563 private:
1565 using inode4_type = typename ArtPolicy::inode4_type;
1567 using inode16_type = typename ArtPolicy::inode16_type;
1569 using inode48_type = typename ArtPolicy::inode48_type;
1571 using inode256_type = typename ArtPolicy::inode256_type;
1572
1574 using leaf_type = typename ArtPolicy::leaf_type;
1575
1579 [[nodiscard]] static constexpr std::uint8_t leaf_key_byte_at(
1580 const leaf_type* leaf, tree_depth_type depth) noexcept {
1581 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_key_in_leaf) {
1582 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1583 return 0;
1584 } else {
1585 return static_cast<std::uint8_t>(leaf->get_key_view()[depth]);
1586 }
1587 }
1588
1590
1591 public:
1594
1596 [[nodiscard]] constexpr const auto& get_key_prefix() const noexcept {
1597 return k_prefix;
1598 }
1599
1601 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto& get_key_prefix() noexcept { return k_prefix; }
1602
1606 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto get_children_count() const noexcept {
1607 return children_count.load();
1608 }
1609
1611
1615
1616 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26491)
1617
1618
1627 template <typename ReturnType, typename... Args>
1628 [[nodiscard]] ReturnType add_or_choose_subtree(node_type type,
1629 Args&&... args) {
1630 switch (type) {
1631 case node_type::I4:
1632 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->add_or_choose_subtree(
1633 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1634 case node_type::I16:
1635 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->add_or_choose_subtree(
1636 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1637 case node_type::I48:
1638 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->add_or_choose_subtree(
1639 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1640 case node_type::I256:
1641 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->add_or_choose_subtree(
1642 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1643 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1644 case node_type::LEAF:
1645 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1646 }
1647 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1648 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1649 }
1650
1660 template <typename ReturnType, typename... Args>
1661 [[nodiscard]] ReturnType remove_or_choose_subtree(node_type type,
1662 Args&&... args) {
1663 switch (type) {
1664 case node_type::I4:
1665 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->remove_or_choose_subtree(
1666 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1667 case node_type::I16:
1668 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->remove_or_choose_subtree(
1669 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1670 case node_type::I48:
1671 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->remove_or_choose_subtree(
1672 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1673 case node_type::I256:
1674 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->remove_or_choose_subtree(
1675 std::forward<Args>(args)...);
1676 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1677 case node_type::LEAF:
1678 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1679 }
1680 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1681 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1682 }
1683
1685
1691
1697 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr find_result find_child(
1698 node_type type, std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
1699 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1700 switch (type) {
1701 case node_type::I4:
1702 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->find_child(key_byte);
1703 case node_type::I16:
1704 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->find_child(key_byte);
1705 case node_type::I48:
1706 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->find_child(key_byte);
1707 case node_type::I256:
1708 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->find_child(key_byte);
1709 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1710 case node_type::LEAF:
1711 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1712 }
1713 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1714 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1715 }
1716
1718 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr bool is_value_in_slot(
1719 node_type type, std::uint8_t child_i) const noexcept {
1720 switch (type) {
1721 case node_type::I4:
1722 return static_cast<const inode4_type*>(this)->is_value_in_slot(child_i);
1723 // LCOV_EXCL_START — dispatch only called with I4 today
1724 case node_type::I16:
1725 return static_cast<const inode16_type*>(this)->is_value_in_slot(
1726 child_i);
1727 case node_type::I48:
1728 return static_cast<const inode48_type*>(this)->is_value_in_slot(
1729 child_i);
1730 case node_type::I256:
1731 return static_cast<const inode256_type*>(this)->is_value_in_slot(
1732 child_i);
1733 case node_type::LEAF:
1734 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1735 }
1736 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1737 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1738 }
1739
1741 constexpr void clear_value_bit(node_type type,
1742 std::uint8_t child_i) noexcept {
1743 switch (type) {
1744 case node_type::I4:
1745 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->clear_value_bit(child_i);
1746 // LCOV_EXCL_START — dispatch only called with I4 today
1747 case node_type::I16:
1748 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->clear_value_bit(child_i);
1749 case node_type::I48:
1750 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->clear_value_bit(child_i);
1751 case node_type::I256:
1752 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->clear_value_bit(child_i);
1753 case node_type::LEAF:
1754 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1755 }
1756 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1757 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1758 }
1759
1764 constexpr void remove_child_entry(node_type type,
1765 std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
1766 switch (type) {
1767 case node_type::I4:
1768 static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->remove_child_entry(child_index);
1769 return;
1770 case node_type::I16:
1771 static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->remove_child_entry(child_index);
1772 return;
1773 case node_type::I48:
1774 static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->remove_child_entry(child_index);
1775 return;
1776 case node_type::I256:
1777 static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->remove_child_entry(child_index);
1778 return;
1779 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1780 case node_type::LEAF:
1781 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1782 }
1783 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1784 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1785 }
1786
1796 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr node_ptr get_child(
1797 node_type type, std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
1798 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1799 switch (type) {
1800 case node_type::I4:
1801 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->get_child(child_index);
1802 case node_type::I16:
1803 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->get_child(child_index);
1804 case node_type::I48:
1805 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->get_child(child_index);
1806 case node_type::I256:
1807 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->get_child(child_index);
1808 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1809 case node_type::LEAF:
1810 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1811 }
1812 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1813 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1814 }
1815
1820 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr iter_result begin(
1821 node_type type) noexcept {
1822 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1823 switch (type) {
1824 case node_type::I4:
1825 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->begin();
1826 case node_type::I16:
1827 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->begin();
1828 case node_type::I48:
1829 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->begin();
1830 case node_type::I256:
1831 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->begin();
1832 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1833 case node_type::LEAF:
1834 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1835 }
1836 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1837 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1838 }
1839
1844 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr iter_result last(node_type type) noexcept {
1845 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1846 switch (type) {
1847 case node_type::I4:
1848 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->last();
1849 case node_type::I16:
1850 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->last();
1851 case node_type::I48:
1852 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->last();
1853 case node_type::I256:
1854 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->last();
1855 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1856 case node_type::LEAF:
1857 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1858 }
1859 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1860 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1861 }
1862
1868 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr iter_result_opt next(
1869 node_type type, std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
1870 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1871 switch (type) {
1872 case node_type::I4:
1873 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->next(child_index);
1874 case node_type::I16:
1875 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->next(child_index);
1876 case node_type::I48:
1877 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->next(child_index);
1878 case node_type::I256:
1879 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->next(child_index);
1880 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1881 case node_type::LEAF:
1882 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1883 }
1884 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1885 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1886 }
1887
1893 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr iter_result_opt prior(
1894 node_type type, std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
1895 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1896 switch (type) {
1897 case node_type::I4:
1898 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->prior(child_index);
1899 case node_type::I16:
1900 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->prior(child_index);
1901 case node_type::I48:
1902 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->prior(child_index);
1903 case node_type::I256:
1904 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->prior(child_index);
1905 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1906 case node_type::LEAF:
1907 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1908 }
1909 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1910 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1911 }
1912
1920 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr iter_result_opt lte_key_byte(
1921 node_type type, std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
1922 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1923 switch (type) {
1924 case node_type::I4:
1925 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->lte_key_byte(key_byte);
1926 case node_type::I16:
1927 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->lte_key_byte(key_byte);
1928 case node_type::I48:
1929 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->lte_key_byte(key_byte);
1930 case node_type::I256:
1931 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->lte_key_byte(key_byte);
1932 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1933 case node_type::LEAF:
1934 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1935 }
1936 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1937 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1938 }
1939
1947 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr iter_result_opt gte_key_byte(
1948 node_type type, std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
1949 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(type != node_type::LEAF);
1950 switch (type) {
1951 case node_type::I4:
1952 return static_cast<inode4_type*>(this)->gte_key_byte(key_byte);
1953 case node_type::I16:
1954 return static_cast<inode16_type*>(this)->gte_key_byte(key_byte);
1955 case node_type::I48:
1956 return static_cast<inode48_type*>(this)->gte_key_byte(key_byte);
1957 case node_type::I256:
1958 return static_cast<inode256_type*>(this)->gte_key_byte(key_byte);
1959 // LCOV_EXCL_START
1960 case node_type::LEAF:
1961 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1962 }
1963 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN();
1964 // LCOV_EXCL_STOP
1965 }
1966
1967 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
1968
1969
1970
1971
1973
1980 constexpr basic_inode_impl(unsigned children_count_, key_view k1,
1981 art_key_type shifted_k2,
1982 tree_depth<art_key_type> depth) noexcept
1983 : k_prefix{k1, shifted_k2, depth},
1984 children_count{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_)} {}
1985
1987 constexpr basic_inode_impl(unsigned children_count_,
1988 detail::key_prefix_size prefix_len, key_view k1,
1989 tree_depth<art_key_type> depth) noexcept
1990 : k_prefix{prefix_len, k1, depth},
1991 children_count{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_)} {}
1992
1998 constexpr basic_inode_impl(unsigned children_count_, unsigned key_prefix_len,
1999 const inode_type& key_prefix_source_node) noexcept
2000 : k_prefix{key_prefix_len, key_prefix_source_node.get_key_prefix()},
2001 children_count{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_)} {}
2002
2007 constexpr basic_inode_impl(unsigned children_count_,
2008 const basic_inode_impl& other) noexcept
2009 : k_prefix{other.k_prefix},
2010 children_count{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_)} {}
2011
2013
2014 protected:
2016 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os, bool) const {
2017 k_prefix.dump(os);
2018 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
2019 os << ", # children = "
2020 << (children_count_ == 0 ? 256 : static_cast<unsigned>(children_count_));
2021 }
2022
2023 private:
2025 key_prefix<art_key_type, critical_section_policy> k_prefix;
2026 static_assert(sizeof(k_prefix) == 8);
2027
2029 critical_section_policy<std::uint8_t> children_count;
2030
2032 static constexpr std::uint8_t child_not_found_i = 0xFFU;
2033
2034 protected:
2036 static constexpr find_result child_not_found{child_not_found_i, nullptr};
2037
2039 static constexpr iter_result_opt end_result{};
2040
2041 friend class unodb::db<key_type, value_type>;
2042 friend class unodb::olc_db<key_type, value_type>;
2043 friend struct olc_inode_immediate_deleter;
2044
2045 template <class, unsigned, unsigned, node_type, class, class, class>
2046 friend class basic_inode;
2047
2048 template <class>
2049 friend class basic_inode_4;
2050
2051 template <class>
2052 friend class basic_inode_16;
2053
2054 template <class>
2055 friend class basic_inode_48;
2056
2057 template <class>
2058 friend class basic_inode_256;
2059}; // class basic_inode_impl
2060
2074template <class ArtPolicy, unsigned MinSize, unsigned Capacity,
2075 node_type NodeType, class SmallerDerived, class LargerDerived,
2076 class Derived>
2077class [[nodiscard]] basic_inode : public basic_inode_impl<ArtPolicy> {
2078 static_assert(NodeType != node_type::LEAF);
2079 static_assert(!std::is_same_v<Derived, LargerDerived>);
2080 static_assert(!std::is_same_v<SmallerDerived, Derived>);
2081 static_assert(!std::is_same_v<SmallerDerived, LargerDerived>);
2082 static_assert(MinSize < Capacity);
2083
2085 using parent = basic_inode_impl<ArtPolicy>;
2086
2087 public:
2088 using typename parent::db_leaf_unique_ptr;
2089 using typename parent::db_type;
2090 using typename parent::node_ptr;
2091
2097 template <typename... Args>
2098 [[nodiscard]] static constexpr auto create(db_type& db_instance,
2099 Args&&... args) {
2100 return ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_unique_ptr<Derived>(
2101 db_instance, std::forward<Args>(args)...);
2102 }
2103
2104#ifndef NDEBUG
2105
2107 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_full_for_add() const noexcept {
2108 return this->children_count == capacity;
2109 }
2110
2111#endif
2112
2114 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_min_size() const noexcept {
2115 return this->children_count == min_size;
2116 }
2117
2119 static constexpr auto min_size = MinSize;
2121 static constexpr auto capacity = Capacity;
2123 static constexpr auto type = NodeType;
2124
2126 using larger_derived_type = LargerDerived;
2128 using smaller_derived_type = SmallerDerived;
2130 using inode_type = typename parent::inode_type;
2131
2132 protected:
2133 using typename parent::art_key_type;
2134 using typename parent::tree_depth_type;
2135
2141 constexpr basic_inode(unodb::key_view k1, art_key_type shifted_k2,
2142 tree_depth<art_key_type> depth) noexcept
2143 : parent{MinSize, k1, shifted_k2, depth} {
2144 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(is_min_size());
2145 }
2146
2151 constexpr basic_inode(unsigned key_prefix_len,
2152 const inode_type& key_prefix_source_node) noexcept
2153 : parent{MinSize, key_prefix_len, key_prefix_source_node} {
2154 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(is_min_size());
2155 }
2156
2158 explicit constexpr basic_inode(const SmallerDerived& source_node) noexcept
2159 : parent{MinSize, source_node} {
2160 // Cannot assert that source_node.is_full_for_add because we are creating
2161 // this node optimistically in the case of OLC.
2162 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(is_min_size());
2163 }
2164
2166 explicit constexpr basic_inode(const LargerDerived& source_node) noexcept
2167 : parent{Capacity, source_node} {
2168 // Cannot assert that source_node.is_min_size because we are creating this
2169 // node optimistically in the case of OLC.
2170 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(is_full_for_add());
2171 }
2172
2174 struct single_child_tag {};
2175
2185 constexpr basic_inode(unodb::key_view k1, art_key_type shifted_k2,
2186 tree_depth<art_key_type> depth,
2187 single_child_tag) noexcept
2188 : parent{1, k1, shifted_k2, depth} {}
2189
2192 constexpr basic_inode(detail::key_prefix_size prefix_len, unodb::key_view k1,
2193 tree_depth<art_key_type> depth,
2194 single_child_tag) noexcept
2195 : parent{1, prefix_len, k1, depth} {}
2196};
2197
2199template <class ArtPolicy>
2200using basic_inode_4_parent =
2201 basic_inode<ArtPolicy, 2, 4, node_type::I4, fake_inode,
2202 typename ArtPolicy::inode16_type,
2203 typename ArtPolicy::inode4_type>;
2204
2213template <class ArtPolicy>
2214class basic_inode_4
2215 : public basic_inode_4_parent<ArtPolicy>,
2216 private value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf, std::uint8_t,
2217 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy> {
2219 using parent_class = basic_inode_4_parent<ArtPolicy>;
2221 using bitmask_base =
2222 value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf, std::uint8_t,
2223 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy>;
2224
2225 using typename parent_class::inode16_type;
2226 using typename parent_class::inode4_type;
2227 using typename parent_class::inode_type;
2228
2230 template <typename T>
2231 using critical_section_policy =
2232 typename ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy<T>;
2233
2234 public:
2235 using typename parent_class::art_key_type;
2236 using typename parent_class::db_inode4_unique_ptr;
2237 using typename parent_class::db_leaf_unique_ptr;
2238 using typename parent_class::db_type;
2239 using typename parent_class::find_result;
2240 using typename parent_class::larger_derived_type;
2241 using typename parent_class::leaf_type;
2242 using typename parent_class::node_ptr;
2243
2245 using tree_depth_type = tree_depth<art_key_type>;
2246
2249
2255 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, unodb::key_view k1, art_key_type shifted_k2,
2256 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2257 tree_depth_type depth) noexcept
2258 : parent_class{k1, shifted_k2, depth} {}
2259
2267 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, key_view k1, art_key_type shifted_k2,
2268 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2269 tree_depth_type depth, leaf_type* child1,
2270 db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child2) noexcept
2271 : parent_class{k1, shifted_k2, depth} {
2272 init(k1, shifted_k2, depth, child1, std::move(child2));
2273 }
2274
2279 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2280 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, node_ptr source_node, unsigned len) noexcept
2281 : parent_class{len, *source_node.template ptr<inode_type*>()} {}
2282
2289 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, node_ptr source_node, unsigned len,
2290 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2291 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
2292 db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child1) noexcept
2293 : parent_class{len, *source_node.template ptr<inode_type*>()} {
2294 init(source_node, len, depth, std::move(child1));
2295 }
2296
2298 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, node_ptr source_node, unsigned len,
2299 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2300 tree_depth_type depth, db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child1,
2301 std::byte child1_key_byte) noexcept
2302 : parent_class{len, *source_node.template ptr<inode_type*>()} {
2303 init(source_node, len, depth, std::move(child1), child1_key_byte);
2304 }
2305
2307 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, node_ptr source_node, unsigned len,
2308 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2309 tree_depth_type depth, node_ptr child1_value,
2310 std::byte child1_key_byte) noexcept
2311 : parent_class{len, *source_node.template ptr<inode_type*>()} {
2312 init(source_node, len, depth, child1_value, child1_key_byte);
2313 }
2314
2316 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, const inode16_type& source_node) noexcept
2317 : parent_class{source_node} {}
2318
2324 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type& db_instance, inode16_type& source_node,
2325 std::uint8_t child_to_delete)
2326 : parent_class{source_node} {
2327 init(db_instance, source_node, child_to_delete);
2328 }
2329
2342 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, key_view k1, art_key_type remaining_key,
2343 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2344 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
2345 std::byte key_byte, node_ptr child) noexcept
2346 : parent_class{k1, remaining_key, depth,
2347 typename parent_class::single_child_tag{}} {
2348 init(key_byte, child);
2349 }
2350
2352 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool can_collapse(
2353 std::uint8_t child_to_delete) const noexcept {
2354 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->is_min_size());
2355 const std::uint8_t child_to_leave = (child_to_delete == 0) ? 1U : 0U;
2356 const auto child_ptr = children[child_to_leave].load();
2357 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2358 if (is_value_in_slot(child_to_leave)) return false;
2359 }
2360 if (child_ptr.type() == node_type::LEAF) {
2361 // For keyless leaves, collapsing would lose key bytes encoded
2362 // in this inode's prefix+dispatch. Keep the chain intact.
2363 return !ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_key_in_leaf;
2364 }
2365 const auto* const child_inode{child_ptr.template ptr<inode_type*>()};
2366 return this->get_key_prefix().length() +
2367 child_inode->get_key_prefix().length() <
2368 detail::key_prefix_capacity;
2369 }
2370
2373 constexpr basic_inode_4(db_type&, key_view k1,
2374 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2375 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
2376 detail::key_prefix_size prefix_len,
2377 std::byte key_byte, node_ptr child) noexcept
2378 : parent_class{prefix_len, k1, depth,
2379 typename parent_class::single_child_tag{}} {
2380 init(key_byte, child);
2381 }
2382
2384
2387
2396 template <typename LeafPtr>
2397 constexpr void init(node_ptr source_node, unsigned shared_prefix_len,
2398 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth, LeafPtr&& child1,
2399 std::byte child1_key_byte) {
2400 auto* const source_inode{source_node.template ptr<inode_type*>()};
2401 auto& source_key_prefix = source_inode->get_key_prefix();
2402 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(shared_prefix_len < source_key_prefix.length());
2403
2404 const auto source_node_key_byte = source_key_prefix[shared_prefix_len];
2405 source_key_prefix.cut(static_cast<key_prefix_size>(shared_prefix_len) + 1U);
2406 add_two_to_empty(source_node_key_byte, source_node, child1_key_byte,
2407 std::move(child1));
2408 }
2409
2412 template <typename LeafPtr>
2413 constexpr void init(node_ptr source_node, unsigned shared_prefix_len,
2414 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
2415 LeafPtr&& child1) {
2416 const auto diff_key_byte_i = depth + shared_prefix_len;
2417 init(source_node, shared_prefix_len, depth, std::forward<LeafPtr>(child1),
2418 static_cast<std::byte>(this->leaf_key_byte_at(
2419 child1.get(), tree_depth_type{diff_key_byte_i})));
2420 }
2421
2427 // MSVC C26815 false positive: reclaim objects intentionally destroyed at
2428 // scope exit while db_instance (passed by caller) remains valid.
2429 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
2430 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26460)
2431 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance, inode16_type& source_node,
2432 std::uint8_t child_to_delete) {
2433 const auto reclaim_source_node{
2434 ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<inode16_type>(
2435 &source_node, db_instance)};
2436 auto source_keys_itr = source_node.keys.byte_array.cbegin();
2437 auto keys_itr = keys.byte_array.begin();
2438 auto source_children_itr = source_node.children.cbegin();
2439 auto children_itr = children.begin();
2440
2441 while (source_keys_itr !=
2442 source_node.keys.byte_array.cbegin() + child_to_delete) {
2443 *keys_itr++ = *source_keys_itr++;
2444 *children_itr++ = *source_children_itr++;
2445 }
2446
2447 [[maybe_unused]] const auto r{
2448 ArtPolicy::reclaim_if_leaf(source_children_itr->load(), db_instance)};
2449
2450 ++source_keys_itr;
2451 ++source_children_itr;
2452
2453 while (source_keys_itr !=
2454 source_node.keys.byte_array.cbegin() + inode16_type::min_size) {
2455 *keys_itr++ = *source_keys_itr++;
2456 *children_itr++ = *source_children_itr++;
2457 }
2458
2459 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == basic_inode_4::capacity);
2460 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(
2461 std::is_sorted(keys.byte_array.cbegin(),
2462 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + basic_inode_4::capacity));
2463
2464 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2465 std::uint8_t dst = 0;
2466 for (std::uint8_t src = 0; src < inode16_type::min_size; ++src) {
2467 if (src == child_to_delete) continue;
2468 if (source_node.is_value_in_slot(src)) set_value_bit(dst);
2469 ++dst;
2470 }
2471 }
2472 }
2473 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
2474 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
2475
2483 constexpr void init(key_view k1, art_key_type shifted_k2,
2484 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2485 tree_depth_type depth, const leaf_type* child1,
2486 db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child2) noexcept {
2487 const auto k2_next_byte_depth = this->get_key_prefix().length();
2488 const auto k1_next_byte_depth = k2_next_byte_depth + depth;
2489 add_two_to_empty(k1[k1_next_byte_depth], node_ptr{child1, node_type::LEAF},
2490 shifted_k2[k2_next_byte_depth], std::move(child2));
2491 }
2492
2497 constexpr void init(std::byte key_byte, node_ptr child) noexcept {
2498 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == 1);
2499
2500 keys.byte_array[0] = key_byte;
2501 children[0] = child;
2502#ifndef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2503 keys.byte_array[1] = unused_key_byte;
2504 keys.byte_array[2] = unused_key_byte;
2505 keys.byte_array[3] = unused_key_byte;
2506#endif
2507 }
2508
2510
2519 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
2520 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2521 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
2522 std::byte key_byte,
2523 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
2524 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ == this->children_count);
2525 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < parent_class::capacity);
2526 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
2527 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
2528
2529 const auto kb = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte);
2530#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2531 const auto mask = (1U << children_count_) - 1;
2532 const auto insert_pos_index = get_insert_pos(kb, mask);
2533#else
2534 // This is also currently the best ARM implementation.
2535 const auto first_lt = ((keys.integer & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
2536 const auto second_lt = (((keys.integer >> 8U) & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
2537 const auto third_lt = ((keys.integer >> 16U) & 0xFFU) < kb ? 1 : 0;
2538 const auto insert_pos_index =
2539 static_cast<unsigned>(first_lt + second_lt + third_lt);
2540#endif
2541
2542 for (typename decltype(keys.byte_array)::size_type i = children_count_;
2543 i > insert_pos_index; --i) {
2544 keys.byte_array[i] = keys.byte_array[i - 1];
2545 children[i] = children[i - 1];
2546 }
2547 keys.byte_array[insert_pos_index] = key_byte;
2548 children[insert_pos_index] = node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF};
2549
2550 // Shift value bitmask to match shifted children array.
2551 // The new entry is a leaf (not a packed value), so no bit is set for it.
2552 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2553 bitmask_base::insert_at(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
2554 }
2555
2556 ++children_count_;
2557 this->children_count = children_count_;
2558
2559 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
2560 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
2561 }
2562
2564 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(node_ptr packed_value,
2565 // cppcheck-suppress passedByValue
2566 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
2567 std::byte key_byte,
2568 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
2569 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ == this->children_count);
2570 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < parent_class::capacity);
2571
2572 const auto kb = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte);
2573#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2574 const auto mask = (1U << children_count_) - 1;
2575 const auto insert_pos_index = get_insert_pos(kb, mask);
2576#else
2577 const auto first_lt = ((keys.integer & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
2578 const auto second_lt = (((keys.integer >> 8U) & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
2579 const auto third_lt = ((keys.integer >> 16U) & 0xFFU) < kb ? 1 : 0;
2580 const auto insert_pos_index =
2581 static_cast<unsigned>(first_lt + second_lt + third_lt);
2582#endif
2583
2584 for (typename decltype(keys.byte_array)::size_type i = children_count_;
2585 i > insert_pos_index; --i) {
2586 keys.byte_array[i] = keys.byte_array[i - 1];
2587 children[i] = children[i - 1];
2588 }
2589 keys.byte_array[insert_pos_index] = key_byte;
2590 children[insert_pos_index] = packed_value;
2591 // Shift existing value bits to match shifted children, then set new bit.
2592 bitmask_base::insert_at(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
2593 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
2594
2595 ++children_count_;
2596 this->children_count = children_count_;
2597 }
2598
2603 // MSVC C26815 false positive: reclaim object intentionally destroyed at
2604 // scope exit while db_instance (passed by caller) remains valid.
2605 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26460)
2606 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
2607 constexpr void remove(std::uint8_t child_index,
2608 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
2609 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_index < this->children_count.load());
2610
2611 if constexpr (!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2612 const auto r{ArtPolicy::reclaim_leaf_on_scope_exit(
2613 children[child_index].load().template ptr<leaf_type*>(),
2614 db_instance)};
2615 }
2616
2617 remove_child_entry(child_index);
2618 }
2619
2626 constexpr void remove_child_entry(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
2627 auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
2628
2629 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_index < children_count_);
2630 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
2631 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
2632
2633 typename decltype(keys.byte_array)::size_type i = child_index;
2634 for (; i < static_cast<unsigned>(children_count_ - 1); ++i) {
2635 keys.byte_array[i] = keys.byte_array[i + 1];
2636 children[i] = children[i + 1];
2637 }
2638#ifndef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2639 keys.byte_array[i] = unused_key_byte;
2640#endif
2641
2642 --children_count_;
2643 this->children_count = children_count_;
2644
2645 // Shift bitmask bits to match shifted children array.
2646 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2647 bitmask_base::remove_at(child_index);
2648 }
2649
2650 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
2651 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
2652 }
2653 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
2654 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
2655
2662 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_CLANG_21_WARNING("-Wnrvo")
2663 [[nodiscard]] constexpr auto leave_last_child(std::uint8_t child_to_delete,
2664 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
2665 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->is_min_size());
2666 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(readability-simplify-boolean-expr)
2667 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_to_delete == 0 || child_to_delete == 1);
2668
2669 if constexpr (!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2670 auto* const child_to_delete_ptr{
2671 children[child_to_delete].load().template ptr<leaf_type*>()};
2672 const auto r{ArtPolicy::reclaim_leaf_on_scope_exit(child_to_delete_ptr,
2673 db_instance)};
2674 }
2675
2676 const std::uint8_t child_to_leave = (child_to_delete == 0) ? 1U : 0U;
2677 const auto child_to_leave_ptr = children[child_to_leave].load();
2678 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26814)
2679 const bool remaining_is_value =
2680 ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf && is_value_in_slot(child_to_leave);
2681 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
2682 if (!remaining_is_value && child_to_leave_ptr.type() != node_type::LEAF) {
2683 auto* const inode_to_leave_ptr{
2684 child_to_leave_ptr.template ptr<inode_type*>()};
2685 inode_to_leave_ptr->get_key_prefix().prepend(
2686 this->get_key_prefix(), keys.byte_array[child_to_leave]);
2687 }
2688 return child_to_leave_ptr;
2689 }
2690 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_CLANG_21_WARNINGS()
2691
2692
2697 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] find_result find_child(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
2698#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2699 const auto replicated_search_key =
2700 _mm_set1_epi8(static_cast<char>(key_byte));
2701 const auto keys_in_sse_reg =
2702 _mm_cvtsi32_si128(static_cast<std::int32_t>(keys.integer.load()));
2703 const auto matching_key_positions =
2704 _mm_cmpeq_epi8(replicated_search_key, keys_in_sse_reg);
2705 const auto mask = (1U << this->children_count.load()) - 1;
2706 const auto bit_field =
2707 static_cast<unsigned>(_mm_movemask_epi8(matching_key_positions)) & mask;
2708 if (bit_field != 0) {
2709 const auto i = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(std::countr_zero(bit_field));
2710 return std::make_pair(
2711 i, static_cast<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>(&children[i]));
2712 }
2713 return parent_class::child_not_found;
2714#elif defined(__aarch64__)
2715 const auto replicated_search_key =
2716 vdupq_n_u8(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte));
2717 const auto keys_in_neon_reg = vreinterpretq_u8_u32(
2718 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
2719 vsetq_lane_u32(keys.integer.load(), vdupq_n_u32(0), 0));
2720 const auto mask = (1ULL << (this->children_count.load() << 3U)) - 1;
2721 const auto matching_key_positions =
2722 vceqq_u8(replicated_search_key, keys_in_neon_reg);
2723 const auto u64_pos_in_vec =
2724 vget_low_u64(vreinterpretq_u64_u8(matching_key_positions));
2725 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
2726 const auto pos_in_scalar = vget_lane_u64(u64_pos_in_vec, 0);
2727 const auto masked_pos = pos_in_scalar & mask;
2728
2729 if (masked_pos == 0) return parent_class::child_not_found;
2730
2731 const auto i = static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(masked_pos) >> 3U);
2732 return std::make_pair(
2733 i, static_cast<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>(&children[i]));
2734#else // #ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2735 // Bit twiddling:
2736 // contains_byte: std::countr_zero: for key index:
2737 // 0x80000000 0x1F 3
2738 // 0x800000 0x17 2
2739 // 0x8000 0x0F 1
2740 // 0x80 0x07 0
2741 // 0x0 UB (check!) not found
2742 const auto match = contains_byte(keys.integer, key_byte);
2743 if (match == 0) return parent_class::child_not_found;
2744
2745 const auto result =
2746 static_cast<typename decltype(keys.byte_array)::size_type>(
2747 std::countr_zero(match) >> 3U);
2748
2749 // The condition could be replaced with masking, but this seems to result
2750 // in a benchmark regression
2751 if (result >= this->children_count.load())
2752 return parent_class::child_not_found;
2753
2754 return std::make_pair(
2755 result,
2756 static_cast<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>(&children[result]));
2757#endif // #ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2758 }
2759
2765 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr node_ptr get_child(
2766 std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
2767 return children[child_index].load();
2768 }
2769
2773 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_4::iter_result
2774 begin() noexcept {
2775 const auto key = keys.byte_array[0].load();
2776 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I4}, key, static_cast<uint8_t>(0),
2777 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
2778 }
2779
2783 // TODO(laurynas) The iter_result-returning sequences follow the
2784 // same pattern once child_index is known. Look into extracting a
2785 // small helper method. This might apply to other inode types
2786 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_4::iter_result
2787 last() noexcept {
2788 const auto child_index{
2789 static_cast<std::uint8_t>(this->children_count.load() - 1)};
2790 const auto key = keys.byte_array[child_index].load();
2791 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I4}, key, child_index,
2792 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
2793 }
2794
2800 // TODO(laurynas) explore 1) branchless 2) SIMD implementations for
2801 // begin(), last(), next(), prior(), get_key_byte(), and
2802 // lte_key_byte(). next() and begin() will be the most frequently
2803 // invoked methods (assuming forward traversal), so that would be
2804 // the place to start. The GTE and LTE methods are only used by
2805 // seek() so they are relatively rarely invoked. Look at each of the
2806 // inode types when doing this.
2807 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_4::iter_result_opt
2808 next(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
2809 const auto nchildren{this->children_count.load()};
2810 const auto next_index{static_cast<uint8_t>(child_index + 1)};
2811 if (next_index >= nchildren) return parent_class::end_result;
2812 const auto key = keys.byte_array[next_index].load();
2813 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I4}, key, next_index,
2814 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
2815 }
2816
2822 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_4::iter_result_opt
2823 prior(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
2824 if (child_index == 0) return parent_class::end_result;
2825 const auto next_index{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(child_index - 1)};
2826 const auto key = keys.byte_array[next_index].load();
2827 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I4}, key, next_index,
2828 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
2829 }
2830
2836 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_4::iter_result_opt
2837 gte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
2838 const auto nchildren{this->children_count.load()};
2839 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < nchildren; ++i) {
2840 const auto key = keys.byte_array[i].load();
2841 if (key >= key_byte) {
2842 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I4}, key, i,
2843 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
2844 }
2845 }
2846 // This should only occur if there is no entry in the keys[] which
2847 // is greater-than the given [key_byte].
2848 return parent_class::end_result;
2849 }
2850
2856 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_4::iter_result_opt
2857 lte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
2858 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
2859 for (std::int64_t i = children_count_ - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
2860 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
2861 const auto key = keys.byte_array[child_index].load();
2862 if (key <= key_byte) {
2863 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I4}, key, child_index,
2864 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
2865 }
2866 }
2867 // The first key in the node is GT the given key_byte.
2868 return parent_class::end_result;
2869 }
2870
2874 constexpr void delete_subtree(db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
2875 const std::uint8_t children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
2876 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; ++i) {
2877 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2878 if (is_value_in_slot(i)) continue; // packed value, nothing to free
2879 }
2880 ArtPolicy::delete_subtree(children[i], db_instance);
2881 }
2882 }
2883
2888 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os,
2889 bool recursive) const {
2890 parent_class::dump(os, recursive);
2891 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
2892 os << ", key_bytes:";
2893 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; i++)
2894 dump_byte(os, keys.byte_array[i]);
2895 if (recursive) {
2896 os << ", children: \n";
2897 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; i++) {
2898 if (is_value_in_slot(i)) {
2899 os << " [" << static_cast<unsigned>(i) << "] value=";
2900 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
2901 os << ArtPolicy::unpack_value(children[i].load());
2902 }
2903 os << "\n";
2904 } else {
2905 ArtPolicy::dump_node(os, children[i].load());
2906 }
2907 }
2908 }
2909 }
2910
2911 private:
2918 constexpr void add_two_to_empty(std::byte key1, node_ptr child1,
2919 std::byte key2,
2920 db_leaf_unique_ptr child2) noexcept {
2921 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(key1 != key2);
2922 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == 2);
2923
2924 const std::uint8_t key1_i = key1 < key2 ? 0U : 1U;
2925 const std::uint8_t key2_i = 1U - key1_i;
2926 keys.byte_array[key1_i] = key1;
2927 children[key1_i] = child1;
2928 keys.byte_array[key2_i] = key2;
2929 children[key2_i] = node_ptr{child2.release(), node_type::LEAF};
2930#ifndef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2931 keys.byte_array[2] = unused_key_byte;
2932 keys.byte_array[3] = unused_key_byte;
2933#endif
2934
2935 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(
2936 std::is_sorted(keys.byte_array.cbegin(),
2937 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + this->children_count));
2938 }
2939
2941 constexpr void add_two_to_empty(std::byte key1, node_ptr child1,
2942 std::byte key2, node_ptr child2) noexcept {
2943 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(key1 != key2);
2944 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == 2);
2945
2946 const std::uint8_t key1_i = key1 < key2 ? 0U : 1U;
2947 const std::uint8_t key2_i = 1U - key1_i;
2948 keys.byte_array[key1_i] = key1;
2949 children[key1_i] = child1;
2950 keys.byte_array[key2_i] = key2;
2951 children[key2_i] = child2;
2952 // child2 is always a packed value in the value-in-slot path.
2953 // child1 may be an inode (existing subtree) or a packed value.
2954 set_value_bit(key2_i);
2955#ifndef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
2956 keys.byte_array[2] = unused_key_byte;
2957 keys.byte_array[3] = unused_key_byte;
2958#endif
2959
2960 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(
2961 std::is_sorted(keys.byte_array.cbegin(),
2962 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + this->children_count));
2963 }
2964
2966 union key_union {
2968 std::array<critical_section_policy<std::byte>, basic_inode_4::capacity>
2969 byte_array;
2971 critical_section_policy<std::uint32_t> integer;
2972
2974 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26495)
2975 constexpr key_union() noexcept {}
2976 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
2977 };
2978
2980 public:
2981 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_value_in_slot(std::uint8_t i) const noexcept {
2982 return bitmask_base::test(i);
2983 }
2985 constexpr void set_value_bit(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
2986 bitmask_base::set(i);
2987 }
2989 constexpr void clear_value_bit(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
2990 bitmask_base::clear(i);
2991 }
2992
2994 key_union keys;
2995
2996 static_assert(std::alignment_of_v<decltype(keys)> == 4);
2997 static_assert(sizeof(keys) == 4);
2998
2999 protected:
3001 std::array<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>, basic_inode_4::capacity>
3002 children;
3003
3004 static_assert(sizeof(children) == 32);
3005
3006 private:
3007#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3014 [[nodiscard]] auto get_insert_pos(std::uint8_t insert_key_byte,
3015 unsigned node_key_mask) const noexcept {
3016 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(node_key_mask ==
3017 (1U << this->children_count.load()) - 1);
3018
3019 const auto replicated_insert_key_byte =
3020 _mm_set1_epi8(static_cast<char>(insert_key_byte));
3021 const auto node_keys_in_sse_reg =
3022 _mm_cvtsi32_si128(static_cast<std::int32_t>(keys.integer.load()));
3023 // Since the existing and insert key values cannot be equal, it's OK to use
3024 // "<=" comparison as "<".
3025 const auto le_node_key_positions =
3026 _mm_cmple_epu8(node_keys_in_sse_reg, replicated_insert_key_byte);
3027 const auto bit_field =
3028 static_cast<unsigned>(_mm_movemask_epi8(le_node_key_positions)) &
3029 node_key_mask;
3030 return static_cast<unsigned>(std::popcount(bit_field));
3031 }
3032#else
3034 static constexpr std::byte unused_key_byte{0xFF};
3035#endif
3036
3037 template <class>
3038 friend class basic_inode_16;
3039 friend class basic_inode_impl<ArtPolicy>;
3040}; // class basic_inode_4
3041
3043template <class ArtPolicy>
3044using basic_inode_16_parent = basic_inode<
3045 ArtPolicy, 5, 16, node_type::I16, typename ArtPolicy::inode4_type,
3046 typename ArtPolicy::inode48_type, typename ArtPolicy::inode16_type>;
3047
3055template <class ArtPolicy>
3056class basic_inode_16
3057 : public basic_inode_16_parent<ArtPolicy>,
3058 private value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf, std::uint16_t,
3059 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy> {
3061 using parent_class = basic_inode_16_parent<ArtPolicy>;
3063 using bitmask_base =
3064 value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf, std::uint16_t,
3065 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy>;
3066
3067 using typename parent_class::inode16_type;
3068 using typename parent_class::inode48_type;
3069 using typename parent_class::inode4_type;
