3070 using typename parent_class::leaf_type;
3071 using typename parent_class::node_ptr;
3072
3074 template <typename T>
3075 using critical_section_policy =
3076 typename ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy<T>;
3077
3078 public:
3079 using typename parent_class::db_leaf_unique_ptr;
3080 using typename parent_class::db_type;
3081 using typename parent_class::find_result;
3082 using typename parent_class::tree_depth_type;
3083
3085 constexpr basic_inode_16(db_type&, const inode4_type& source_node) noexcept
3086 : parent_class{source_node} {}
3087
3089 constexpr basic_inode_16(db_type&, const inode48_type& source_node) noexcept
3090 : parent_class{source_node} {}
3091
3098 constexpr basic_inode_16(db_type& db_instance, inode4_type& source_node,
3099 db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
3100 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3101 std::byte key_byte) noexcept
3102 : parent_class{source_node} {
3103 init(db_instance, source_node, std::move(child), depth, key_byte);
3104 }
3105
3107 constexpr basic_inode_16(db_type& db_instance, inode4_type& source_node,
3108 node_ptr packed_value,
3109 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3110 std::byte key_byte) noexcept
3111 : parent_class{source_node} {
3112 init(db_instance, source_node, packed_value, depth, key_byte);
3113 }
3114
3120 constexpr basic_inode_16(db_type& db_instance, inode48_type& source_node,
3121 std::uint8_t child_to_delete) noexcept
3122 : parent_class{source_node} {
3123 init(db_instance, source_node, child_to_delete);
3124 }
3125
3132 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance, inode4_type& source_node,
3133 db_leaf_unique_ptr child,
3134 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3135 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3136 // This overload is only for trees with actual leaves. When
3137 // can_eliminate_leaf is true, init_grow unconditionally sets the
3138 // value bit — which is correct because only the packed-value
3139 // overload below can be called in that mode.
3140 static_assert(!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
3141 "leaf init must not be called when leaves are eliminated");
3142 init_grow(db_instance, source_node,
3143 node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF}, key_byte);
3144 }
3145
3147 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance, inode4_type& source_node,
3148 node_ptr packed_value,
3149 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3150 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3151 init_grow(db_instance, source_node, packed_value, key_byte);
3152 }
3153
3155 constexpr void init_grow(db_type& db_instance, inode4_type& source_node,
3156 node_ptr child_val, std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3157 const auto reclaim_source_node{
3158 ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<inode4_type>(
3159 &source_node, db_instance)};
3160 const auto kb = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte);
3161
3162#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3163 const auto insert_pos_index = source_node.get_insert_pos(kb, 0xFU);
3164#else
3165 const auto keys_integer = source_node.keys.integer.load();
3166 const auto first_lt = ((keys_integer & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
3167 const auto second_lt = (((keys_integer >> 8U) & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
3168 const auto third_lt = (((keys_integer >> 16U) & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
3169 const auto fourth_lt = (((keys_integer >> 24U) & 0xFFU) < kb) ? 1 : 0;
3170 const auto insert_pos_index =
3171 static_cast<unsigned>(first_lt + second_lt + third_lt + fourth_lt);
3172#endif
3173
3174 unsigned i = 0;
3175 for (; i < insert_pos_index; ++i) {
3176 keys.byte_array[i] = source_node.keys.byte_array[i];
3177 children[i] = source_node.children[i];
3178 }
3179
3180 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSUME(i < parent_class::capacity);
3181
3182 keys.byte_array[i] = key_byte;
3183 children[i] = child_val;
3184 ++i;
3185
3186 for (; i <= inode4_type::capacity; ++i) {
3187 keys.byte_array[i] = source_node.keys.byte_array[i - 1];
3188 children[i] = source_node.children[i - 1];
3189 }
3190
3191 // Copy value bitmask from source, inserting the new child's bit.
3192 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3193 for (unsigned j = 0; j < insert_pos_index; ++j) {
3194 if (source_node.is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(j)))
3195 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(j));
3196 }
3197 // The new child at insert_pos_index is a packed value
3198 // (this overload is only called for value-in-slot).
3199 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
3200 for (unsigned j = insert_pos_index; j < inode4_type::capacity; ++j) {
3201 if (source_node.is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(j)))
3202 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(j + 1));
3203 }
3204 }
3205 }
3206
3212 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance, inode48_type& source_node,
3213 std::uint8_t child_to_delete) noexcept {
3214 const auto reclaim_source_node{
3215 ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<inode48_type>(
3216 &source_node, db_instance)};
3217 source_node.remove_child_pointer(child_to_delete, db_instance);
3218 source_node.child_indexes[child_to_delete] = inode48_type::empty_child;
3219
3220 // TODO(laurynas): consider AVX2 gather?
3221 unsigned next_child = 0;
3222 unsigned i = 0;
3223 while (true) {
3224 const auto source_child_i = source_node.child_indexes[i].load();
3225 if (source_child_i != inode48_type::empty_child) {
3226 keys.byte_array[next_child] = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
3227 const auto source_child_ptr =
3228 source_node.children.pointer_array[source_child_i].load();
3229 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(source_child_ptr != nullptr ||
3230 source_node.is_value_in_slot_by_ci(source_child_i));
3231 children[next_child] = source_child_ptr;
3232 ++next_child;
3233 if (next_child == basic_inode_16::capacity) break;
3234 }
3235 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(i < 255);
3236 ++i;
3237 }
3238
3239 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == basic_inode_16::capacity);
3240 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(
3241 std::is_sorted(keys.byte_array.cbegin(),
3242 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + basic_inode_16::capacity));
3243
3244 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3245 // Copy bitmask from I48. I48 uses slot indices; we mapped them
3246 // to sequential positions in the loop above. Re-scan to set bits.
3247 next_child = 0;
3248 for (unsigned j = 0; j <= i; ++j) {
3249 const auto sci = source_node.child_indexes[j].load();
3250 if (sci != inode48_type::empty_child) {
3251 if (source_node.is_value_in_slot_by_ci(sci))
3252 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(next_child));
3253 ++next_child;
3254 if (next_child == basic_inode_16::capacity) break;
3255 }
3256 }
3257 }
3258 }
3259
3268 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
3269 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3270 std::byte key_byte,
3271 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
3272 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ == this->children_count);
3273 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < parent_class::capacity);
3274 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
3275 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
3276
3277 const auto insert_pos_index =
3278 get_sorted_key_array_insert_position(key_byte);
3279
3280 if (insert_pos_index != children_count_) {
3281 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(insert_pos_index < children_count_);
3282 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(keys.byte_array[insert_pos_index] != key_byte);
3283
3284 std::copy_backward(keys.byte_array.cbegin() + insert_pos_index,
3285 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_,
3286 keys.byte_array.begin() + children_count_ + 1);
3287 std::copy_backward(children.begin() + insert_pos_index,
3288 children.begin() + children_count_,
3289 children.begin() + children_count_ + 1);
3290 }
3291
3292 keys.byte_array[insert_pos_index] = key_byte;
3293 children[insert_pos_index] = node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF};
3294 // Shift value bitmask to match shifted children array.
3295 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3296 bitmask_base::insert_at(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
3297 }
3298 ++children_count_;
3299 this->children_count = children_count_;
3300
3301 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
3302 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
3303 }
3304
3306 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(node_ptr packed_value,
3307 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3308 std::byte key_byte,
3309 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
3310 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ == this->children_count);
3311 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < parent_class::capacity);
3312 const auto insert_pos_index =
3313 get_sorted_key_array_insert_position(key_byte);
3314 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSUME(insert_pos_index < parent_class::capacity);
3315 if (insert_pos_index != children_count_) {
3316 std::copy_backward(keys.byte_array.cbegin() + insert_pos_index,
3317 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_,
3318 keys.byte_array.begin() + children_count_ + 1);
3319 std::copy_backward(children.begin() + insert_pos_index,
3320 children.begin() + children_count_,
3321 children.begin() + children_count_ + 1);
3322 }
3323 keys.byte_array[insert_pos_index] = key_byte;
3324 children[insert_pos_index] = packed_value;
3325 // Shift existing value bits to match shifted children, then set new bit.
3326 bitmask_base::insert_at(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
3327 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(insert_pos_index));
3328 ++children_count_;
3329 this->children_count = children_count_;
3330 }
3331
3336 // MSVC C26815 false positive: reclaim object intentionally destroyed at
3337 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26460)
3338 // scope exit while db_instance (passed by caller) remains valid.
3339 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
3340 constexpr void remove(std::uint8_t child_index,
3341 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
3342 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_index < this->children_count.load());
3343
3344 if constexpr (!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3345 const auto r{ArtPolicy::reclaim_leaf_on_scope_exit(
3346 children[child_index].load().template ptr<leaf_type*>(),
3347 db_instance)};
3348 }
3349
3350 remove_child_entry(child_index);
3351 }
3352
3356 constexpr void remove_child_entry(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
3357 auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
3358 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_index < children_count_);
3359 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
3360 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
3361
3362 for (unsigned i = child_index + 1U; i < children_count_; ++i) {
3363 keys.byte_array[i - 1] = keys.byte_array[i];
3364 children[i - 1] = children[i];
3365 }
3366
3367 --children_count_;
3368 this->children_count = children_count_;
3369
3370 // Shift bitmask bits to match shifted children array.
3371 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3372 bitmask_base::remove_at(child_index);
3373 }
3374
3375 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
3376 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
3377 }
3378 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
3379 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
3380
3386 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr find_result find_child(
3387 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3388#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3389 const auto replicated_search_key =
3390 _mm_set1_epi8(static_cast<char>(key_byte));
3391 const auto matching_key_positions =
3392 _mm_cmpeq_epi8(replicated_search_key, keys.byte_vector);
3393 const auto mask = (1U << this->children_count) - 1;
3394 const auto bit_field =
3395 static_cast<unsigned>(_mm_movemask_epi8(matching_key_positions)) & mask;
3396 if (bit_field != 0) {
3397 const auto i = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(std::countr_zero(bit_field));
3398 return std::make_pair(
3399 i, static_cast<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>(&children[i]));
3400 }
3401 return parent_class::child_not_found;
3402#elif defined(__aarch64__)
3403 const auto replicated_search_key =
3404 vdupq_n_u8(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte));
3405 const auto matching_key_positions =
3406 vceqq_u8(replicated_search_key, keys.byte_vector);
3407 const auto narrowed_positions =
3408 vshrn_n_u16(vreinterpretq_u16_u8(matching_key_positions), 4);
3409 const auto scalar_pos =
3410 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
3411 vget_lane_u64(vreinterpret_u64_u8(narrowed_positions), 0);
3412 const auto child_count = this->children_count.load();
3413 const auto mask = (child_count == 16) ? 0xFFFFFFFF'FFFFFFFFULL
3414 : (1ULL << (child_count << 2U)) - 1;
3415 const auto masked_pos = scalar_pos & mask;
3416
3417 if (masked_pos == 0) return parent_class::child_not_found;
3418
3419 const auto i = static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(masked_pos) >> 2U);
3420 return std::make_pair(
3421 i, static_cast<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>(&children[i]));
3422#else
3423 for (size_t i = 0; i < this->children_count.load(); ++i)
3424 if (key_byte == keys.byte_array[i])
3425 return std::make_pair(
3426 i, static_cast<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>*>(&children[i]));
3427 return parent_class::child_not_found;
3428#endif
3429 }
3430
3436 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr node_ptr get_child(
3437 std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
3438 return children[child_index].load();
3439 }
3440
3444 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_16::iter_result
3445 begin() noexcept {
3446 const auto key = keys.byte_array[0].load();
3447 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I16}, key, 0,
3448 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
3449 }
3450
3454 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_16::iter_result
3455 last() noexcept {
3456 const auto child_index{
3457 static_cast<std::uint8_t>(this->children_count.load() - 1)};
3458 const auto key = keys.byte_array[child_index].load();
3459 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I16}, key, child_index,
3460 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
3461 }
3462
3468 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_16::iter_result_opt
3469 next(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
3470 const auto nchildren{this->children_count.load()};
3471 const auto next_index{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(child_index + 1)};
3472 if (next_index >= nchildren) return parent_class::end_result;
3473 const auto key = keys.byte_array[next_index].load();
3474 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I16}, key, next_index,
3475 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
3476 }
3477
3483 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_16::iter_result_opt
3484 prior(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
3485 if (child_index == 0) return parent_class::end_result;
3486 const auto next_index{static_cast<std::uint8_t>(child_index - 1)};
3487 const auto key = keys.byte_array[next_index].load();
3488 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I16}, key, next_index,
3489 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
3490 }
3491
3497 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_16::iter_result_opt
3498 lte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3499 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
3500 for (std::int64_t i = children_count_ - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
3501 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
3502 const auto key = keys.byte_array[child_index].load();
3503 if (key <= key_byte) {
3504 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I16}, key, child_index,
3505 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
3506 }
3507 }
3508 // The first key in the node is GT the given key_byte.
3509 return parent_class::end_result;
3510 }
3511
3517 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_16::iter_result_opt
3518 gte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3519 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
3520 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; ++i) {
3521 const auto key = keys.byte_array[i].load();
3522 if (key >= key_byte) {
3523 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I16}, key, i,
3524 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
3525 }
3526 }
3527 // This should only occur if there is no entry in the keys[] which
3528 // is greater-than the given [key_byte].
3529 return parent_class::end_result;
3530 }
3531
3535 constexpr void delete_subtree(db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
3536 const uint8_t children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
3537 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; ++i) {
3538 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3539 if (is_value_in_slot(i)) continue;
3540 }
3541 ArtPolicy::delete_subtree(children[i], db_instance);
3542 }
3543 }
3544
3549 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os,
3550 bool recursive) const {
3551 parent_class::dump(os, recursive);
3552 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
3553 os << ", key bytes =";
3554 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; ++i)
3555 dump_byte(os, keys.byte_array[i]);
3556 if (recursive) {
3557 os << ", children: \n";
3558 for (std::uint8_t i = 0; i < children_count_; ++i) {
3559 if (is_value_in_slot(i)) {
3560 os << " [" << static_cast<unsigned>(i) << "] value=";
3561 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3562 os << ArtPolicy::unpack_value(children[i].load());
3563 }
3564 os << "\n";
3565 } else {
3566 ArtPolicy::dump_node(os, children[i].load());
3567 }
3568 }
3569 }
3570 }
3571
3572 private:
3578 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr auto get_sorted_key_array_insert_position(
3579 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3580 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
3581
3582 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < basic_inode_16::capacity);
3583 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(std::is_sorted(
3584 keys.byte_array.cbegin(), keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_));
3585 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(
3586 std::adjacent_find(keys.byte_array.cbegin(),
3587 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_) >=
3588 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_);
3589
3590#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3591 const auto replicated_insert_key =
3592 _mm_set1_epi8(static_cast<char>(key_byte));
3593 const auto lesser_key_positions =
3594 _mm_cmple_epu8(replicated_insert_key, keys.byte_vector);
3595 const auto mask = (1U << children_count_) - 1;
3596 const auto bit_field =
3597 static_cast<unsigned>(_mm_movemask_epi8(lesser_key_positions)) & mask;
3598 const auto result =
3599 (bit_field != 0)
3600 ? static_cast<std::uint8_t>(std::countr_zero(bit_field))
3601 : static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_);
3602#else
3603 // This is also the best current ARM implementation
3604 const auto result = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(
3605 std::lower_bound(keys.byte_array.cbegin(),
3606 keys.byte_array.cbegin() + children_count_, key_byte) -
3607 keys.byte_array.cbegin());
3608#endif
3609
3610 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(
3611 result == children_count_ ||
3612 (result < children_count_ && keys.byte_array[result] != key_byte));
3613 return result;
3614 }
3615
3616 protected:
3618 union key_union {
3620 std::array<critical_section_policy<std::byte>, basic_inode_16::capacity>
3621 byte_array;
3622#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3624 __m128i byte_vector;
3625#elif defined(__aarch64__)
3627 uint8x16_t byte_vector;
3628#endif
3630 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26495)
3631 key_union() noexcept {}
3632 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
3633 };
3634
3635 public:
3636 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_value_in_slot(std::uint8_t i) const noexcept {
3637 return bitmask_base::test(i);
3638 }
3639 constexpr void set_value_bit(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
3640 bitmask_base::set(i);
3641 }
3642 constexpr void clear_value_bit(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
3643 bitmask_base::clear(i);
3644 }
3645
3647 key_union keys;
3648
3650 std::array<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>, basic_inode_16::capacity>
3651 children;
3652
3653 private:
3655 static constexpr std::uint8_t empty_child = 0xFF;
3656
3657 template <class>
3658 friend class basic_inode_4;
3659 friend class basic_inode_impl<ArtPolicy>;
3660 template <class>
3661 friend class basic_inode_48;
3662}; // class basic_inode_16
3663
3665template <class ArtPolicy>
3666using basic_inode_48_parent = basic_inode<
3667 ArtPolicy, 17, 48, node_type::I48, typename ArtPolicy::inode16_type,
3668 typename ArtPolicy::inode256_type, typename ArtPolicy::inode48_type>;
3669
3677template <class ArtPolicy>
3678class basic_inode_48
3679 : public basic_inode_48_parent<ArtPolicy>,
3680 private value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
3681 std::array<std::uint8_t, 6>,
3682 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy> {
3684 using parent_class = basic_inode_48_parent<ArtPolicy>;
3686 using bitmask_base =
3687 value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
3688 std::array<std::uint8_t, 6>,
3689 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy>;
3690
3691 using typename parent_class::inode16_type;
3692 using typename parent_class::inode256_type;
3693 using typename parent_class::inode48_type;
3694 using typename parent_class::leaf_type;
3695 using typename parent_class::node_ptr;
3696
3698 template <typename T>
3699 using critical_section_policy =
3700 typename ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy<T>;
3701
3702 public:
3703 using typename parent_class::db_leaf_unique_ptr;
3704 using typename parent_class::db_type;
3705 using typename parent_class::tree_depth_type;
3706
3708 constexpr basic_inode_48(db_type&, const inode16_type& source_node) noexcept
3709 : parent_class{source_node} {}
3710
3712 constexpr basic_inode_48(db_type&, const inode256_type& source_node) noexcept
3713 : parent_class{source_node} {}
3714
3721 constexpr basic_inode_48(db_type& db_instance,
3722 inode16_type& __restrict source_node,
3723 db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
3724 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3725 std::byte key_byte) noexcept
3726 : parent_class{source_node} {
3727 init(db_instance, source_node, std::move(child), depth, key_byte);
3728 }
3729
3731 constexpr basic_inode_48(db_type& db_instance,
3732 inode16_type& __restrict source_node,
3733 node_ptr packed_value,
3734 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3735 std::byte key_byte) noexcept
3736 : parent_class{source_node} {
3737 init(db_instance, source_node, packed_value, depth, key_byte);
3738 }
3739
3745 constexpr basic_inode_48(db_type& db_instance,
3746 inode256_type& __restrict source_node,
3747 std::uint8_t child_to_delete) noexcept
3748 : parent_class{source_node} {
3749 init(db_instance, source_node, child_to_delete);
3750 }
3751
3758 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance,
3759 inode16_type& __restrict source_node,
3760 db_leaf_unique_ptr child,
3761 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3762 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3763 static_assert(!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
3764 "leaf init must not be called when leaves are eliminated");
3765 init_grow(db_instance, source_node,
3766 node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF}, key_byte);
3767 }
3768
3770 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance,
3771 inode16_type& __restrict source_node,
3772 node_ptr packed_value,
3773 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3774 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3775 init_grow(db_instance, source_node, packed_value, key_byte);
3776 }
3777
3779 constexpr void init_grow(db_type& db_instance,
3780 inode16_type& __restrict source_node,
3781 node_ptr child_val, std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
3782 const auto reclaim_source_node{
3783 ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<inode16_type>(
3784 &source_node, db_instance)};
3785
3786 std::uint8_t i = 0;
3787 for (; i < inode16_type::capacity; ++i) {
3788 const auto existing_key_byte = source_node.keys.byte_array[i].load();
3789 child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(existing_key_byte)] = i;
3790 }
3791 for (i = 0; i < inode16_type::capacity; ++i) {
3792 children.pointer_array[i] = source_node.children[i];
3793 }
3794
3795 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] ==
3796 empty_child);
3797 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSUME(i == inode16_type::capacity);
3798
3799 child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] = i;
3800 children.pointer_array[i] = child_val;
3801 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3802 // Copy bitmask from source I16 (indexed by position).
3803 for (std::uint8_t j = 0; j < inode16_type::capacity; ++j) {
3804 if (source_node.is_value_in_slot(j)) set_value_bit_by_ci(j);
3805 }
3806 // The new child is a packed value.
3807 set_value_bit_by_ci(i);
3808 }
3809 for (i = this->children_count; i < basic_inode_48::capacity; i++) {
3810 children.pointer_array[i] = node_ptr{nullptr};
3811 }
3812 }
3813
3819 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26460)
3820 // MSVC C26815 false positive: reclaim objects intentionally destroyed at
3821 // scope exit while db_instance (passed by caller) remains valid.
3822 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
3823 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance,
3824 inode256_type& __restrict source_node,
3825 std::uint8_t child_to_delete) noexcept {
3826 const auto reclaim_source_node{
3827 ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<inode256_type>(
3828 &source_node, db_instance)};
3829 [[maybe_unused]] const auto r{ArtPolicy::reclaim_if_leaf(
3830 source_node.children[child_to_delete].load(), db_instance)};
3831
3832 source_node.children[child_to_delete] = node_ptr{nullptr};
3833 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3834 source_node.clear_value_bit(child_to_delete);
3835 }
3836
3837 std::uint8_t next_child = 0;
3838 for (unsigned child_i = 0; child_i < 256; child_i++) {
3839 const auto child_ptr = source_node.children[child_i].load();
3840 if (child_ptr == nullptr &&
3841 !(ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf &&
3842 source_node.is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(child_i))))
3843 continue;
3844
3845 child_indexes[child_i] = next_child;
3846 children.pointer_array[next_child] = source_node.children[child_i].load();
3847 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
3848 if (source_node.is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(child_i)))
3849 set_value_bit_by_ci(next_child);
3850 }
3851 ++next_child;
3852
3853 if (next_child == basic_inode_48::capacity) return;
3854 }
3855 }
3856 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
3857 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
3858
3867 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
3868 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3869 std::byte key_byte,
3870 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
3871 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == children_count_);
3872 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ >= parent_class::min_size);
3873 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < parent_class::capacity);
3874
3875 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] ==
3876 empty_child);
3877 unsigned i{0};
3878#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_SSE4_2
3879 const auto nullptr_vector = _mm_setzero_si128();
3880 while (true) {
3881 const auto ptr_vec0 = _mm_load_si128(&children.pointer_vector[i]);
3882 const auto ptr_vec1 = _mm_load_si128(&children.pointer_vector[i + 1]);
3883 const auto ptr_vec2 = _mm_load_si128(&children.pointer_vector[i + 2]);
3884 const auto ptr_vec3 = _mm_load_si128(&children.pointer_vector[i + 3]);
3885 const auto vec0_cmp = _mm_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec0, nullptr_vector);
3886 const auto vec1_cmp = _mm_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec1, nullptr_vector);
3887 const auto vec2_cmp = _mm_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec2, nullptr_vector);
3888 const auto vec3_cmp = _mm_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec3, nullptr_vector);
3889 // OK to treat 64-bit comparison result as 32-bit vector: we need to find
3890 // the first 0xFF only.
3891 const auto vec01_cmp = _mm_packs_epi32(vec0_cmp, vec1_cmp);
3892 const auto vec23_cmp = _mm_packs_epi32(vec2_cmp, vec3_cmp);
3893 const auto vec_cmp = _mm_packs_epi32(vec01_cmp, vec23_cmp);
3894 const auto cmp_mask =
3895 static_cast<std::uint64_t>(_mm_movemask_epi8(vec_cmp));
3896 if (cmp_mask != 0) {
3897 i = (i << 1U) +
3898 ((static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(cmp_mask)) + 1U) >> 1U);
3899 break;
3900 }
3901 i += 4;
3902 }
3903#elif defined(UNODB_DETAIL_AVX2)
3904 const auto nullptr_vector = _mm256_setzero_si256();
3905 while (true) {
3906 const auto ptr_vec0 = _mm256_load_si256(&children.pointer_vector[i]);
3907 const auto ptr_vec1 = _mm256_load_si256(&children.pointer_vector[i + 1]);
3908 const auto ptr_vec2 = _mm256_load_si256(&children.pointer_vector[i + 2]);
3909 const auto ptr_vec3 = _mm256_load_si256(&children.pointer_vector[i + 3]);
3910 const auto vec0_cmp = _mm256_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec0, nullptr_vector);
3911 const auto vec1_cmp = _mm256_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec1, nullptr_vector);
3912 const auto vec2_cmp = _mm256_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec2, nullptr_vector);
3913 const auto vec3_cmp = _mm256_cmpeq_epi64(ptr_vec3, nullptr_vector);
3914 const auto interleaved_vec01_cmp = _mm256_packs_epi32(vec0_cmp, vec1_cmp);
3915 const auto interleaved_vec23_cmp = _mm256_packs_epi32(vec2_cmp, vec3_cmp);
3916 const auto doubly_interleaved_vec_cmp =
3917 _mm256_packs_epi32(interleaved_vec01_cmp, interleaved_vec23_cmp);
3918 if (!_mm256_testz_si256(doubly_interleaved_vec_cmp,
3919 doubly_interleaved_vec_cmp)) {
3920 const auto vec01_cmp =
3921 _mm256_permute4x64_epi64(interleaved_vec01_cmp, 0b11'01'10'00);
3922 const auto vec23_cmp =
3923 _mm256_permute4x64_epi64(interleaved_vec23_cmp, 0b11'01'10'00);
3924 const auto interleaved_vec_cmp =
3925 _mm256_packs_epi32(vec01_cmp, vec23_cmp);
3926 const auto vec_cmp =
3927 _mm256_permute4x64_epi64(interleaved_vec_cmp, 0b11'01'10'00);
3928 const auto cmp_mask =
3929 static_cast<std::uint64_t>(_mm256_movemask_epi8(vec_cmp));
3930 i = (i << 2U) +
3931 (static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(cmp_mask)) >> 1U);
3932 break;
3933 }
3934 i += 4;
3935 }
3936#elif defined(__aarch64__)
3937 const auto nullptr_vector = vdupq_n_u64(0);
3938 while (true) {
3939 const auto ptr_vec0 = children.pointer_vector[i];
3940 const auto ptr_vec1 = children.pointer_vector[i + 1];
3941 const auto ptr_vec2 = children.pointer_vector[i + 2];
3942 const auto ptr_vec3 = children.pointer_vector[i + 3];
3943 const auto vec0_cmp = vceqq_u64(nullptr_vector, ptr_vec0);
3944 const auto vec1_cmp = vceqq_u64(nullptr_vector, ptr_vec1);
3945 const auto vec2_cmp = vceqq_u64(nullptr_vector, ptr_vec2);
3946 const auto vec3_cmp = vceqq_u64(nullptr_vector, ptr_vec3);
3947 const auto narrowed_cmp0 = vshrn_n_u64(vec0_cmp, 4);
3948 const auto narrowed_cmp1 = vshrn_n_u64(vec1_cmp, 4);
3949 const auto narrowed_cmp2 = vshrn_n_u64(vec2_cmp, 4);
3950 const auto narrowed_cmp3 = vshrn_n_u64(vec3_cmp, 4);
3951 const auto cmp01 = vcombine_u32(narrowed_cmp0, narrowed_cmp1);
3952 const auto cmp23 = vcombine_u32(narrowed_cmp2, narrowed_cmp3);
3953 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
3954 const auto narrowed_cmp01 = vshrn_n_u32(cmp01, 4);
3955 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
3956 const auto narrowed_cmp23 = vshrn_n_u32(cmp23, 4);
3957 const auto cmp = vcombine_u16(narrowed_cmp01, narrowed_cmp23);
3958 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
3959 const auto narrowed_cmp = vshrn_n_u16(cmp, 4);
3960 const auto scalar_pos =
3961 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-const-correctness)
3962 vget_lane_u64(vreinterpret_u64_u8(narrowed_cmp), 0);
3963 if (scalar_pos != 0) {
3964 i = (i << 1U) +
3965 static_cast<unsigned>(std::countr_zero(scalar_pos) >> 3U);
3966 break;
3967 }
3968 i += 4;
3969 }
3970#else // #ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3971 node_ptr child_ptr;
3972 while (true) {
3973 child_ptr = children.pointer_array[i];
3974 if (child_ptr == nullptr) break;
3975 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(i < 255);
3976 ++i;
3977 }
3978#endif // #ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_X86_64
3979
3980 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSUME(i < parent_class::capacity);
3981
3982#ifndef NDEBUG
3983 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children.pointer_array[i] == nullptr);
3984 for (unsigned j = 0; j < i; ++j)
3985 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children.pointer_array[j] != nullptr);
3986#endif
3987
3988 child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] =
3989 static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
3990 children.pointer_array[i] = node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF};
3991 this->children_count = children_count_ + 1U;
3992 }
3993
3995 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(node_ptr packed_value,
3996 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
3997 std::byte key_byte,
3998 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
3999 // Reuse the leaf overload by wrapping the packed value in a
4000 // temporary unique_ptr that immediately releases. This avoids
4001 // duplicating the SIMD slot-finding logic.
4002 // TODO(#707): refactor to share slot-finding code without this hack.
4003 std::ignore = children_count_;
4004 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] ==
4005 empty_child);
4006 // Find first empty slot (not occupied by pointer or VIS value).
4007 unsigned slot = 0;
4008 while (children.pointer_array[slot] != nullptr ||
4009 is_value_in_slot_by_ci(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(slot))) {
4010 ++slot;
4011 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(slot < parent_class::capacity);
4012 }
4013 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSUME(slot < 48);
4014 child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] =
4015 static_cast<std::uint8_t>(slot);
4016 children.pointer_array[slot] = packed_value;
4017 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte));
4018 this->children_count = this->children_count + 1U;
4019 }
4020
4025 constexpr void remove(std::uint8_t child_index,
4026 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
4027 remove_child_pointer(child_index, db_instance);
4028 remove_child_entry(child_index);
4029 }
4030
4034 constexpr void remove_child_entry(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4035 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4036 clear_value_bit(child_index);
4037 }
4038 children.pointer_array[child_indexes[child_index]] = node_ptr{nullptr};
4039 child_indexes[child_index] = empty_child;
4040 --this->children_count;
4041 }
4042
4048 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::find_result
4049 find_child(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4050 const auto child_i =
4051 child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)].load();
4052 if (child_i != empty_child) {
4053 return std::make_pair(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte),
4054 &children.pointer_array[child_i]);
4055 }
4056 return parent_class::child_not_found;
4057 }
4058
4067 // N48: This is the case where we need to indirect through child_indices.
4068 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr node_ptr get_child(
4069 std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4070 const auto child_i = child_indexes[child_index].load();
4071 // In a data race, the child_indices[] can be concurrently
4072 // modified, which will cause the OLC version tag to get
4073 // bumped. However, we are in the middle of reading and acting on
4074 // the data while that happens. This can cause the value stored
4075 // in child_indices[] at our desired child_index to be empty_child
4076 // (0xFF). In this circumstance, the caller will correctly detect
4077 // a problem when they do read_critical_section::check(), but we
4078 // will have still indirected beyond the end of the allocation and
4079 // ASAN can fail us. To prevent that and read only the data that
4080 // is legally allocated to the node, we return nullptr in this
4081 // case and rely on the caller to detect a problem when they call
4082 // read_critical_section::check().
4083 return UNODB_DETAIL_UNLIKELY(child_i == empty_child)
4084 ? node_ptr() // aka nullptr
4085 : children.pointer_array[child_i].load();
4086 }
4087
4093 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::iter_result
4094 begin() noexcept {
4095 for (std::uint64_t i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
4096 // cppcheck-suppress useStlAlgorithm
4097 if (child_indexes[i] != empty_child) {
4098 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4099 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4100 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I48}, key, child_index,
4101 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
4102 }
4103 }
4104 // because we always have at least 17 keys.
4105 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN(); // LCOV_EXCL_LINE
4106 }
4107
4113 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::iter_result
4114 last() noexcept {
4115 for (std::int64_t i = 255; i >= 0; i--) {
4116 if (child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i)] != empty_child) {
4117 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4118 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4119 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I48}, key, child_index,
4120 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
4121 }
4122 }
4123 // because we always have at least 17 keys.
4124 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN(); // LCOV_EXCL_LINE
4125 }
4126
4132 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::iter_result_opt
4133 next(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4134 // loop over the remaining byte values in lexical order.
4135 for (auto i = static_cast<std::uint64_t>(child_index) + 1; i < 256; i++) {
4136 // cppcheck-suppress useStlAlgorithm
4137 if (child_indexes[i] != empty_child) {
4138 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4139 const auto next_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4140 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I48}, key, next_index,
4141 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4142 }
4143 }
4144 return parent_class::end_result;
4145 }
4146
4152 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::iter_result_opt
4153 prior(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4154 // loop over the prior byte values in lexical order.
4155 for (auto i = static_cast<std::int64_t>(child_index) - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
4156 if (child_indexes[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i)] != empty_child) {
4157 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4158 const auto next_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4159 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I48}, key, next_index,
4160 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4161 }
4162 }
4163 return parent_class::end_result;
4164 }
4165
4171 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::iter_result_opt
4172 lte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4173 // loop over the prior byte values in lexical order.
4174 for (auto i = static_cast<std::int64_t>(key_byte); i >= 0; i--) {
4175 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4176 if (child_indexes[child_index] != empty_child) {
4177 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4178 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I48}, key, child_index,
4179 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4180 }
4181 }
4182 return parent_class::end_result;
4183 }
4184
4190 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_48::iter_result_opt
4191 gte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4192 // loop over the remaining byte values in lexical order.
4193 for (auto i = static_cast<std::uint64_t>(key_byte); i < 256; i++) {
4194 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4195 if (child_indexes[child_index] != empty_child) {
4196 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4197 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I48}, key, child_index,
4198 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4199 }
4200 }
4201 return parent_class::end_result;
4202 }
4203
4207 constexpr void delete_subtree(db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
4208#ifndef NDEBUG
4209 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
4210 unsigned actual_children_count = 0;
4211#endif
4212
4213 for (unsigned i = 0; i < this->capacity; ++i) {
4214 const auto child = children.pointer_array[i].load();
4215 if (child != nullptr ||
4216 (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf &&
4217 is_value_in_slot_by_ci(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i)))) {
4218 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4219 if (!is_value_in_slot_by_ci(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i))) {
4220 ArtPolicy::delete_subtree(child, db_instance);
4221 }
4222 } else {
4223 ArtPolicy::delete_subtree(child, db_instance);
4224 }
4225#ifndef NDEBUG
4226 ++actual_children_count;
4227 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(actual_children_count <= children_count_);
4228#endif
4229 }
4230 }
4231 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(actual_children_count == children_count_);
4232 }
4233
4238 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os,
4239 bool recursive) const {
4240 parent_class::dump(os, recursive);
4241#ifndef NDEBUG
4242 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
4243 unsigned actual_children_count = 0;
4244#endif
4245
4246 os << ", key bytes & child indexes\n";
4247 for (unsigned i = 0; i < 256; i++)
4248 if (child_indexes[i] != empty_child) {
4249 os << " ";
4250 dump_byte(os, static_cast<std::byte>(i));
4251 os << ", child index = " << static_cast<unsigned>(child_indexes[i])
4252 << ": ";
4253 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children.pointer_array[child_indexes[i]] !=
4254 nullptr ||
4255 is_value_in_slot_by_ci(child_indexes[i]));
4256 if (recursive) {
4257 const auto ci = child_indexes[i].load();
4258 if (is_value_in_slot_by_ci(ci)) {
4259 os << "value=";
4260 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4261 os << ArtPolicy::unpack_value(children.pointer_array[ci].load());
4262 }
4263 os << "\n";
4264 } else {
4265 ArtPolicy::dump_node(os, children.pointer_array[ci].load());
4266 }
4267 }
4268#ifndef NDEBUG
4269 ++actual_children_count;
4270 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(actual_children_count <= children_count_);
4271#endif
4272 }
4273
4274 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(actual_children_count == children_count_);
4275 }
4276
4277 private:
4282 constexpr void remove_child_pointer(std::uint8_t child_index,
4283 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
4284 direct_remove_child_pointer(child_indexes[child_index], db_instance);
4285 }
4286
4290 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26460)
4292 // MSVC C26815 false positive: reclaim object intentionally destroyed at
4293 // scope exit while db_instance (passed by caller) remains valid.
4294 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
4295 constexpr void direct_remove_child_pointer(std::uint8_t children_i,
4296 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
4297 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_i != empty_child);
4298
4299 [[maybe_unused]] const auto r{ArtPolicy::reclaim_if_leaf(
4300 children.pointer_array[children_i].load(), db_instance)};
4301 }
4302 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
4303 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
4304
4306 static constexpr std::uint8_t empty_child = 0xFF;
4307
4308 public:
4311 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_value_in_slot(
4312 std::uint8_t key_byte_i) const noexcept {
4313 if constexpr (!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) return false;
4314 const auto ci = child_indexes[key_byte_i].load();
4315 if (ci == empty_child) return false;
4316 return is_value_in_slot_by_ci(ci);
4317 }
4318 constexpr void set_value_bit(std::uint8_t key_byte_i) noexcept {
4319 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4320 const auto ci = child_indexes[key_byte_i].load();
4321 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(ci != empty_child);
4322 bitmask_base::set(ci);
4323 }
4324 }
4325 constexpr void clear_value_bit(std::uint8_t key_byte_i) noexcept {
4326 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4327 const auto ci = child_indexes[key_byte_i].load();
4328 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(ci != empty_child);
4329 bitmask_base::clear(ci);
4330 }
4331 }
4333 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_value_in_slot_by_ci(
4334 std::uint8_t ci) const noexcept {
4335 return bitmask_base::test(ci);
4336 }
4337 constexpr void set_value_bit_by_ci(std::uint8_t ci) noexcept {
4338 bitmask_base::set(ci);
4339 }
4340 // The only way I found to initialize this array so that everyone is happy and
4341 // efficient. In the case of OLC, a std::fill compiles to a loop doing a
4342 // single byte per iteration. memset is likely an UB, and atomic_ref is not
4343 // available in C++17, and I don't like using it anyway, because this variable
4344 // *is* atomic.
4345 std::array<critical_section_policy<std::uint8_t>, 256> child_indexes{
4346 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4347 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4348 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4349 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4350 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4351 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4352 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4353 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4354 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4355 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4356 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4357 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4358 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4359 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4360 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4361 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4362 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4363 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4364 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4365 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4366 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4367 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4368 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4369 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4370 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4371 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4372 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4373 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4374 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4375 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4376 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4377 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4378 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4379 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4380 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4381 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4382 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4383 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4384 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4385 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4386 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4387 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4388 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4389 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4390 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4391 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4392 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4393 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4394 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4395 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4396 empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child, empty_child,
4397 empty_child};
4398
4400 union children_union {
4402 std::array<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>, basic_inode_48::capacity>
4403 pointer_array;
4404#ifdef UNODB_DETAIL_SSE4_2
4405 static_assert(basic_inode_48::capacity % 8 == 0);
4406 // No std::array below because it would ignore the alignment attribute
4407 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(modernize-avoid-c-arrays)
4409 __m128i
4410 pointer_vector[basic_inode_48::capacity / 2]; // NOLINT(runtime/arrays)
4411#elif defined(UNODB_DETAIL_AVX2)
4412 static_assert(basic_inode_48::capacity % 16 == 0);
4413 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(modernize-avoid-c-arrays)
4415 __m256i
4416 pointer_vector[basic_inode_48::capacity / 4]; // NOLINT(runtime/arrays)
4417#elif defined(__aarch64__)
4418 static_assert(basic_inode_48::capacity % 8 == 0);
4419 // NOLINTNEXTLINE(modernize-avoid-c-arrays)
4421 uint64x2_t
4422 pointer_vector[basic_inode_48::capacity / 2]; // NOLINT(runtime/arrays)
4423#endif
4424
4426 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26495)
4427 children_union() noexcept {}
4428 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
4429 };
4430
4432 children_union children;
4433
4434 template <class>
4435 friend class basic_inode_16;
4436 friend class basic_inode_impl<ArtPolicy>;
4437 template <class>
4438 friend class basic_inode_256;
4439}; // class basic_inode_48
4440
4442template <class ArtPolicy>
4443using basic_inode_256_parent =
4444 basic_inode<ArtPolicy, 49, 256, node_type::I256,
4445 typename ArtPolicy::inode48_type, fake_inode,
4446 typename ArtPolicy::inode256_type>;
4447
4456template <class ArtPolicy>
4457class basic_inode_256
4458 : public basic_inode_256_parent<ArtPolicy>,
4459 private value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
4460 std::array<std::uint8_t, 32>,
4461 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy> {
4463 using parent_class = basic_inode_256_parent<ArtPolicy>;
4465 using bitmask_base =
4466 value_bitmask_field<ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
4467 std::array<std::uint8_t, 32>,
4468 ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy>;
4469
4470 using typename parent_class::inode48_type;
4471 using typename parent_class::leaf_type;
4472 using typename parent_class::node_ptr;
4473
4475 template <typename T>
4476 using critical_section_policy =
4477 typename ArtPolicy::template critical_section_policy<T>;
4478
4479 public:
4480 using typename parent_class::db_leaf_unique_ptr;
4481 using typename parent_class::db_type;
4482 using typename parent_class::tree_depth_type;
4483
4485 constexpr basic_inode_256(db_type&, const inode48_type& source_node) noexcept
4486 : parent_class{source_node} {}
4487
4494 constexpr basic_inode_256(db_type& db_instance, inode48_type& source_node,
4495 db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
4496 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
4497 std::byte key_byte) noexcept
4498 : parent_class{source_node} {
4499 init(db_instance, source_node, std::move(child), depth, key_byte);
4500 }
4501
4503 constexpr basic_inode_256(db_type& db_instance, inode48_type& source_node,
4504 node_ptr packed_value,
4505 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
4506 std::byte key_byte) noexcept
4507 : parent_class{source_node} {
4508 init(db_instance, source_node, packed_value, depth, key_byte);
4509 }
4510
4517 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance,
4518 inode48_type& __restrict source_node,
4519 db_leaf_unique_ptr child,
4520 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
4521 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4522 static_assert(!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf,
4523 "leaf init must not be called when leaves are eliminated");
4524 init_grow(db_instance, source_node,
4525 node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF}, key_byte);
4526 }
4527
4529 constexpr void init(db_type& db_instance,
4530 inode48_type& __restrict source_node,
4531 node_ptr packed_value,
4532 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
4533 std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4534 init_grow(db_instance, source_node, packed_value, key_byte);
4535 }
4536
4538 constexpr void init_grow(db_type& db_instance,
4539 inode48_type& __restrict source_node,
4540 node_ptr child_val, std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4541 const auto reclaim_source_node{
4542 ArtPolicy::template make_db_inode_reclaimable_ptr<inode48_type>(
4543 &source_node, db_instance)};
4544 unsigned children_copied = 0;
4545 unsigned i = 0;
4546 while (true) {
4547 const auto children_i = source_node.child_indexes[i].load();
4548 if (children_i == inode48_type::empty_child) {
4549 children[i] = node_ptr{nullptr};
4550 } else {
4551 children[i] = source_node.children.pointer_array[children_i].load();
4552 ++children_copied;
4553 if (children_copied == inode48_type::capacity) break;
4554 }
4555 ++i;
4556 }
4557
4558 ++i;
4559 for (; i < basic_inode_256::capacity; ++i) children[i] = node_ptr{nullptr};
4560
4561 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] ==
4562 nullptr);
4563 children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] = child_val;
4564 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4565 // Copy bitmask from source I48. I48 indexes by slot position,
4566 // I256 indexes by key byte. Map through child_indexes.
4567 for (unsigned j = 0; j < 256; ++j) {
4568 const auto ci = source_node.child_indexes[j].load();
4569 if (ci != inode48_type::empty_child &&
4570 source_node.is_value_in_slot_by_ci(ci)) {
4571 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(j));
4572 }
4573 }
4574 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte));
4575 }
4576 }
4577
4586 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(db_leaf_unique_ptr&& child,
4587 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
4588 std::byte key_byte,
4589 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
4590 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == children_count_);
4591 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children_count_ < parent_class::capacity);
4592
4593 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] ==
4594 nullptr);
4595 children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] =
4596 node_ptr{child.release(), node_type::LEAF};
4597 this->children_count = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_ + 1U);
4598 }
4599
4601 constexpr void add_to_nonfull(node_ptr packed_value,
4602 [[maybe_unused]] tree_depth_type depth,
4603 std::byte key_byte,
4604 std::uint8_t children_count_) noexcept {
4605 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(this->children_count == children_count_);
4606 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] ==
4607 nullptr);
4608 children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte)] = packed_value;
4609 set_value_bit(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte));
4610 this->children_count = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(children_count_ + 1U);
4611 }
4612
4617 // MSVC C26815 false positive: reclaim object intentionally destroyed at
4618 // scope exit while db_instance (passed by caller) remains valid.
4619 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26815)
4620 UNODB_DETAIL_DISABLE_MSVC_WARNING(26460)
4621 constexpr void remove(std::uint8_t child_index,
4622 db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
4623 if constexpr (!ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4624 const auto r{ArtPolicy::reclaim_leaf_on_scope_exit(
4625 children[child_index].load().template ptr<leaf_type*>(),
4626 db_instance)};
4627 }
4628
4629 remove_child_entry(child_index);
4630 }
4631
4635 constexpr void remove_child_entry(std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4636 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4637 clear_value_bit(child_index);
4638 }
4639 children[child_index] = node_ptr{nullptr};
4640 --this->children_count;
4641 }
4642 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
4643 UNODB_DETAIL_RESTORE_MSVC_WARNINGS()
4644
4650 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::find_result
4651 find_child(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4652 const auto key_int_byte = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(key_byte);
4653 if (children[key_int_byte] != nullptr ||
4654 this->is_value_in_slot(key_int_byte))
4655 return std::make_pair(key_int_byte, &children[key_int_byte]);
4656 return parent_class::child_not_found;
4657 }
4658
4664 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr node_ptr get_child(
4665 std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4666 return children[child_index].load();
4667 }
4668
4674 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::iter_result
4675 begin() noexcept {
4676 for (std::uint64_t i = 0; i < basic_inode_256::capacity; i++) {
4677 // cppcheck-suppress useStlAlgorithm
4678 if (children[i] != nullptr ||
4679 this->is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i))) {
4680 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i); // child_index is key byte
4681 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4682 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I256}, key, child_index,
4683 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
4684 }
4685 }
4686 // because we always have at least 49 keys.
4687 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN(); // LCOV_EXCL_LINE
4688 }
4689
4695 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::iter_result
4696 last() noexcept {
4697 for (std::int64_t i = basic_inode_256::capacity - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
4698 if (children[static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i)] != nullptr ||
4699 this->is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i))) {
4700 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i); // child_index is key byte
4701 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4702 return {node_ptr{this, node_type::I256}, key, child_index,
4703 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()};
4704 }
4705 }
4706 // because we always have at least 49 keys.
4707 UNODB_DETAIL_CANNOT_HAPPEN(); // LCOV_EXCL_LINE
4708 }
4709
4715 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::iter_result_opt
4716 next(const std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4717 // loop over the remaining byte values in lexical order.
4718 for (auto i = static_cast<std::uint64_t>(child_index) + 1;
4719 i < basic_inode_256::capacity; i++) {
4720 // cppcheck-suppress useStlAlgorithm
4721 if (children[i] != nullptr ||
4722 this->is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i))) {
4723 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4724 const auto next_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4725 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I256}, key, next_index,
4726 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4727 }
4728 }
4729 return parent_class::end_result;
4730 }
4731
4737 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::iter_result_opt
4738 prior(const std::uint8_t child_index) noexcept {
4739 // loop over the remaining byte values in lexical order.
4740 for (auto i = static_cast<std::int64_t>(child_index) - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
4741 const auto next_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4742 if (children[next_index] != nullptr ||
4743 this->is_value_in_slot(next_index)) {
4744 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4745 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I256}, key, next_index,
4746 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4747 }
4748 }
4749 return parent_class::end_result;
4750 }
4751
4757 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::iter_result_opt
4758 lte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4759 // loop over the prior byte values in lexical order.
4760 for (auto i = static_cast<std::int64_t>(key_byte); i >= 0; i--) {
4761 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4762 if (children[child_index] != nullptr ||
4763 this->is_value_in_slot(child_index)) {
4764 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4765 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I256}, key, child_index,
4766 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4767 }
4768 }
4769 return parent_class::end_result;
4770 }
4771
4777 [[nodiscard, gnu::pure]] constexpr typename basic_inode_256::iter_result_opt
4778 gte_key_byte(std::byte key_byte) noexcept {
4779 // loop over the remaining byte values in lexical order.
4780 for (auto i = static_cast<std::uint64_t>(key_byte);
4781 i < basic_inode_256::capacity; i++) {
4782 const auto child_index = static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i);
4783 if (children[child_index] != nullptr ||
4784 this->is_value_in_slot(child_index)) {
4785 const auto key = static_cast<std::byte>(i);
4786 return {{node_ptr{this, node_type::I256}, key, child_index,
4787 this->get_key_prefix().get_snapshot()}};
4788 }
4789 }
4790 return parent_class::end_result;
4791 }
4792
4797 // TODO(laurynas) Lifting this out might help with iterator and
4798 // lambda patterns.
4799 template <typename Function>
4800 constexpr void for_each_child(Function func) const
4801 noexcept(noexcept(func(0, node_ptr{nullptr}))) {
4802#ifndef NDEBUG
4803 const auto children_count_ = this->children_count.load();
4804 std::uint8_t actual_children_count = 0;
4805#endif
4806
4807 for (unsigned i = 0; i < 256; ++i) {
4808 const auto child_ptr = children[i].load();
4809 if (child_ptr != nullptr ||
4810 (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf &&
4811 this->is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i)))) {
4812 func(i, child_ptr);
4813#ifndef NDEBUG
4814 ++actual_children_count;
4815 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(actual_children_count <= children_count_ ||
4816 children_count_ == 0);
4817#endif
4818 }
4819 }
4820 UNODB_DETAIL_ASSERT(actual_children_count == children_count_);
4821 }
4822
4826 constexpr void delete_subtree(db_type& db_instance) noexcept {
4827 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4828 for_each_child([this, &db_instance](unsigned i, node_ptr child) noexcept {
4829 if (this->is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i))) return;
4830 ArtPolicy::delete_subtree(child, db_instance);
4831 });
4832 } else {
4833 for_each_child(
4834 [&db_instance]([[maybe_unused]] unsigned i, node_ptr child) noexcept {
4835 ArtPolicy::delete_subtree(child, db_instance);
4836 });
4837 }
4838 }
4839
4844 [[gnu::cold]] UNODB_DETAIL_NOINLINE void dump(std::ostream& os,
4845 bool recursive) const {
4846 parent_class::dump(os, recursive);
4847 os << ", key bytes & children:\n";
4848 for_each_child([&os, recursive, this](unsigned i, node_ptr child) {
4849 os << ' ';
4850 dump_byte(os, static_cast<std::byte>(i));
4851 os << ' ';
4852 if (recursive) {
4853 if (is_value_in_slot(static_cast<std::uint8_t>(i))) {
4854 os << "value=";
4855 if constexpr (ArtPolicy::can_eliminate_leaf) {
4856 os << ArtPolicy::unpack_value(child);
4857 }
4858 os << "\n";
4859 } else {
4860 ArtPolicy::dump_node(os, child);
4861 }
4862 }
4863 });
4864 }
4865
4866 public:
4867 [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool is_value_in_slot(std::uint8_t i) const noexcept {
4868 return bitmask_base::test(i);
4869 }
4870 constexpr void set_value_bit(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
4871 bitmask_base::set(i);
4872 }
4873 constexpr void clear_value_bit(std::uint8_t i) noexcept {
4874 bitmask_base::clear(i);
4875 }
4876
4878 std::array<critical_section_policy<node_ptr>, basic_inode_256::capacity>
4879 children;
4880
4881 template <class>
4882 friend class basic_inode_48;
4883 friend class basic_inode_impl<ArtPolicy>;
4884}; // class basic_inode_256
4885
4886} // namespace unodb::detail
4887
4888#endif // UNODB_DETAIL_ART_INTERNAL_IMPL_HPP
art_allocator.hpp
Pluggable allocator for ART trees (header-only, no QSBR dependency).
art_common.hpp
Common declarations for Adaptive Radix Tree (ART) index.
art_internal.hpp
Internal implementation details for Adaptive Radix Tree (ART) index.
assert.hpp
Internal macros for assertions, assumptions & intentional crashing.
unodb::db
A non-thread-safe implementation of the Adaptive Radix Tree (ART).
